  is_active boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this sale type is currently active and available for selection when creating new property_sale and purchase_agreement records. Inactive types are retained for historical reporting but suppressed from new transaction entry workflows.']
  is_distressed_sale boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this sale type is classified as a distressed transaction (e.g., REO Sale, Short Sale, Foreclosure). Distressed sale types trigger specific due diligence workflows, BPO/CMA requirements, and regulatory reporting obligations under HUD and SEC guidelines for REIT portfolios.']
  is_exchange_type boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this sale type qualifies as or involves an IRS Section 1031 like-kind exchange, triggering deferred capital gains tax treatment. When True, the exchange_deadline_date field on property_sale becomes mandatory and specific regulatory reporting obligations apply.']
  is_ground_lease_assignment boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this sale type represents the assignment of a ground lease interest rather than a fee-simple title transfer. Ground lease assignments have distinct title, ALTA policy, and SNDA requirements and are tracked separately in Yardi Voyager Lease Administration.']
  is_leaseback_involved boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this sale type involves a simultaneous or concurrent leaseback arrangement (Sale-Leaseback). When True, ASC 842 / IFRS 16 lease accounting treatment is required post-closing, and the transaction must be linked to a corresponding lease record.']
  is_portfolio_transaction boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this sale type involves the simultaneous transfer of multiple properties as a single portfolio deal. Portfolio transactions require consolidated pricing, blended CAP Rate and NOI analysis, and special handling in Argus Enterprise portfolio reporting and MRI Investment Management.']
  ltv_tracking_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether Loan-to-Value (LTV) ratio must be captured for transactions of this sale type. LTV tracking is required for financed acquisitions and dispositions but not applicable for all-cash transactions, 1031 exchanges with no new debt, or certain distressed sale types.']
  mls_reportable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether transactions of this sale type are eligible and required to be reported to the Multiple Listing Service (MLS). Commercial portfolio sales, ground lease assignments, and certain off-market transactions may be excluded from MLS reporting per NAR guidelines.']
  noi_tracking_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether Net Operating Income (NOI) at time of sale must be captured and tracked for transactions of this sale type. Required for income-producing property acquisitions and dispositions to support CAP Rate calculation, DSCR analysis, and REIT FFO/AFFO reporting.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for administrative notes, clarifications, or special handling instructions related to this sale type. Used by data stewards and transaction coordinators to document edge cases, exceptions, or guidance for deal teams when selecting this transaction type.']
  psf_pricing_applicable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether Per Square Foot (PSF) pricing metrics are applicable and should be calculated for transactions of this sale type. PSF pricing is standard for commercial and residential sales but may not be meaningful for ground lease assignments or certain portfolio transactions.']
  regulatory_reporting_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether transactions of this type trigger mandatory regulatory reporting obligations (e.g., SEC filings for REIT dispositions, HUD reporting for REO sales, IRS 1031 exchange filings, SOX financial controls documentation). Drives automated compliance workflow initiation in the compliance domain.']
  required_due_diligence_items varchar [note: 'Comma-delimited list of mandatory due diligence checklist items required for this sale type (e.g., \'ALTA Survey, Phase I ESG, Title Search, Appraisal, SNDA, Zoning Report\'). Drives automated checklist generation in Procore and DocuSign CLM when a new transaction of this type is opened.']
  sort_order varchar [note: 'Numeric value controlling the display sequence of sale types in dropdown menus, reporting filters, and UI selection lists across Yardi Voyager, Salesforce CRM, and enterprise reporting dashboards. Lower values appear first.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'Code identifying the operational system of record from which this sale type definition originated (e.g., YARDI for Yardi Voyager, MRI for MRI Software, ARGUS for Argus Enterprise, COSTAR for CoStar Suite, MANUAL for manually entered reference data). Supports data lineage and master data management. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: YARDI|MRI|ARGUS|SALESFORCE|COSTAR|SAP|MANUAL — 7 candidates stripped; promote to reference product]']
  title_policy_type_required varchar [note: 'Specifies the ALTA title insurance policy type required for transactions of this sale type: owner\'s policy, lender\'s policy, both, or none. Drives title search workflow initiation and ALTA policy procurement in the title_search product.']
  transaction_category varchar [note: 'Broad property category to which this sale type applies, enabling domain-specific filtering of property_sale records. Drives workflow routing and reporting segmentation across Commercial Real Estate (CRE), residential, land, mixed-use, and portfolio transactions.']
  transfer_tax_applicable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether real estate transfer tax is applicable to transactions of this sale type. Some transaction types (e.g., 1031 exchanges, certain ground lease assignments, intra-entity portfolio transfers) may be exempt from transfer tax under applicable state and local statutes.']
  type_code varchar [note: 'Short, system-facing alphanumeric code uniquely identifying the sale type (e.g., ACQ, DISP, EXCH_1031, REO, SHORT_SALE, FORECLOSURE, PORT_SALE, SLB, GLA). Used as the stable business key for integration with Yardi Voyager, MRI Software, Argus Enterprise, and CoStar Suite transaction classification fields.']
  type_description varchar [note: 'Full narrative description of the sale type, including its legal and operational characteristics, applicable deal structures, and distinguishing features from other transaction types. Used for business glossary documentation and onboarding materials.']
  type_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable display name for the sale type as shown in reporting dashboards, deal pipeline views in Salesforce CRM, and CoStar comparable sales exports (e.g., \'Acquisition\', \'Disposition\', \'1031 Exchange\', \'REO Sale\', \'Short Sale\', \'Foreclosure Sale\', \'Portfolio Sale\', \'Sale-Leaseback\', \'Ground Lease Assignment\').']
  typical_closing_days varchar [note: 'Standard number of calendar days from contract execution to closing typically associated with this sale type. Used as a default for expected_closing_date calculation in property_sale and purchase_agreement records, and for deal pipeline velocity benchmarking in Salesforce CRM.']
  typical_due_diligence_days varchar [note: 'Standard number of calendar days for the due diligence period typically associated with this sale type. Used as a default for due_diligence_end_date calculation in purchase_agreement records. Varies significantly by transaction type (e.g., REO sales typically have shorter DD periods than complex portfolio acquisitions).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this sale type record was last modified in the enterprise data lakehouse Silver layer. Supports change data capture, audit trail requirements under SOX, and data lineage tracking.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Monotonically incrementing version number for this sale type record, supporting optimistic concurrency control and change history tracking. Incremented each time the record is updated. Supports SOX audit trail and reference data governance requirements.']
  yardi_transaction_type_code varchar [note: 'Yardi Voyager\'s native transaction type code mapped to this sale type. Ensures consistent classification when property_sale records are ingested from or exported to Yardi Voyager\'s property management and accounts receivable modules.']

  Note: 'Reference classification table defining standardized transaction type taxonomy — acquisition, disposition, 1031 exchange, REO sale, short sale, foreclosure, portfolio sale, sale-leaseback, and ground lease assignment. Captures type code, display name, transaction category (commercial, residential, land, mixed-use), applicable deal workflow template, and regulatory reporting flag. Used enterprise-wide to classify and filter property_sale records.'
}

Table transaction.sale_attribution {
  sale_attribution_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate identifier for each property sale to campaign attribution record. Primary key.']
  campaign_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the marketing campaign receiving attribution credit']
  lead_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the lead record that connected this campaign to the eventual buyer. Enables tracing attribution back to specific lead generation events.']
  property_sale_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the property sale transaction being attributed to marketing efforts']
  attributed_revenue_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Dollar amount of the property sale revenue credited to this campaign, calculated as purchase_price × attribution_weight. Used for campaign ROI calculation. Explicitly identified in detection phase relationship_data.']
  attribution_confidence_score decimal(3,2) [note: 'Statistical confidence level (0.00 to 1.00) in the accuracy of this attribution assignment, based on data quality, touchpoint tracking completeness, and model certainty. Lower scores indicate probabilistic attribution.']
  attribution_model varchar [note: 'The attribution methodology used to calculate attribution_weight for this record. Values: linear (equal credit), time_decay (recency-weighted), position_based (40/20/40), first_touch (100% to first), last_touch (100% to last), custom (proprietary algorithm). Explicitly identified in detection phase relationship_data.']
  attribution_weight decimal(5,4) [note: 'Proportional credit assigned to this campaign for the property sale, expressed as a decimal between 0 and 1. Sum of all attribution_weight values for a single property_sale_id should equal 1.0 in multi-touch attribution models. Explicitly identified in detection phase relationship_data.']
  campaign_role varchar [note: 'Classification of the campaign\'s role in the buyer journey leading to the sale. Values: first_touch (initial awareness), last_touch (final conversion driver), mid_touch (nurture), assist (supporting touchpoint), direct (single-touch attribution). Explicitly identified in detection phase relationship_data.']
  created_date timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this attribution record was created in the system, typically after the property sale closed and attribution analysis was performed.']
  touch_date date [note: 'Date on which the buyer interacted with this campaign (ad impression, email open, event attendance, listing view). Used for time-decay attribution models and journey timeline reconstruction.']
  touch_sequence varchar [note: 'Ordinal position of this campaign touchpoint in the buyer journey leading to the sale (1 = first touch, 2 = second touch, etc.). Used to reconstruct the full marketing journey and apply position-based attribution models. Explicitly identified in detection phase relationship_data.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User ID or system process that created this attribution record (e.g., marketing_analytics_etl, user_id_12345).']

  Note: 'This association product represents the multi-touch marketing attribution between property sales and marketing campaigns. It captures the contribution of each campaign to a completed property sale, enabling ROI analysis and marketing effectiveness measurement. Each record links one property_sale to one campaign with attribution metrics that exist only in the context of this relationship.. Existence Justification: In real estate marketing operations, a single property sale is routinely attributed to multiple marketing campaigns through multi-touch attribution models (e.g., awareness campaign, retargeting campaign, open house promotion, MLS syndication). Conversely, a single campaign drives multiple property sales across its lifecycle. Marketing teams actively manage and analyze these attribution relationships to calculate campaign ROI, optimize budget allocation, and measure marketing effectiveness. This is an operational business process, not an analytical correlation.'
}

Table transaction.auction {
  auction_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for auction']
  deal_party_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the party who submitted the winning bid.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the licensed auctioneer conducting the auction.']
  owner_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the party selling the property at auction.']
  prior_auction_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on auction (prior_auction_id)']
  property_sale_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the property being auctioned.']
  actual_end_time timestamp [note: 'The actual timestamp when the auction concluded.']
  actual_start_time timestamp [note: 'The actual timestamp when the auction commenced.']
  auction_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique business identifier for the auction event, typically formatted as AUC-YYYYMMDD or similar convention.']
  auction_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the auction event.']
  auction_terms_conditions varchar [note: 'Full text or reference to the legal terms and conditions governing the auction.']
  auction_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the auction format: absolute (no reserve), reserve (minimum price), sealed bid, online, live, or hybrid.']
  auction_venue_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the physical or virtual location where the auction is conducted.']
  bid_increment_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The minimum amount by which each successive bid must increase.']
  buyers_premium_percentage decimal(5,2) [note: 'The percentage fee charged to the winning bidder on top of the winning bid amount.']
  cancellation_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation for why the auction was cancelled, if applicable.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this auction record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts in this auction (e.g., USD, EUR, GBP).']
  deposit_required_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The earnest money or deposit amount required from bidders to participate in the auction.']
  last_modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this auction record was last updated in the system.']
  marketing_description varchar [note: 'Promotional description of the auction used in marketing materials and listings.']
  online_platform_url varchar [note: 'Web address of the online platform hosting the auction, if applicable.']
  registered_bidders_count varchar [note: 'The number of bidders who registered to participate in the auction.']
  registration_deadline timestamp [note: 'The timestamp by which bidders must register to participate in the auction.']
  reserve_met_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the reserve price was met during the auction (True if met, False if not met).']
  reserve_price_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The minimum acceptable price set by the seller below which the property will not be sold. Confidential business data.']
  sale_confirmed_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the sale was confirmed by the seller after the auction concluded (True if confirmed, False if not confirmed).']
  scheduled_date date [note: 'The date on which the auction is scheduled to occur.']
  scheduled_start_time timestamp [note: 'The precise timestamp when the auction is scheduled to begin.']
  starting_bid_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The opening bid amount at which the auction begins.']
  total_bids_received varchar [note: 'The total number of bids submitted during the auction.']
  venue_address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the street address where the auction is physically conducted.']
  venue_city varchar [note: 'City where the auction venue is located.']
  venue_country_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code where the auction venue is located.']
  venue_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code of the auction venue.']
  venue_state_province varchar [note: 'Two-letter state or province code where the auction venue is located.']
  winning_bid_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The final accepted bid amount that won the auction.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for auction. Referenced by auction_id.'
}

Table transaction.bulk_sale_pool {
  bulk_sale_pool_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for bulk_sale_pool']
  brokerage_broker_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the real estate agent or broker responsible for marketing and selling the bulk sale pool.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the user who created the bulk sale pool record.']
  modified_by_user_employee_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the user who last modified the bulk sale pool record.']
  parent_bulk_sale_pool_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on bulk_sale_pool (parent_bulk_sale_pool_id)']
  seller_entity_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the legal entity or organization selling the bulk sale pool.']
  actual_closing_date date [note: 'Actual date when the bulk sale pool transaction was closed and ownership transferred.']
  aggregate_appraised_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total appraised value of all properties in the bulk sale pool based on professional appraisals, in US dollars.']
  aggregate_list_price decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total asking price for the entire bulk sale pool in US dollars.']
  annual_gross_income decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total annual gross rental or operating income generated by all properties in the bulk sale pool, in US dollars.']
  annual_net_operating_income decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total annual net operating income across all properties in the bulk sale pool after operating expenses, in US dollars.']
  capitalization_rate_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Weighted average capitalization rate for the bulk sale pool, calculated as NOI divided by property value, expressed as a percentage.']
  comparable_sales_source varchar [note: 'Primary data source used for comparable sales analysis of the bulk sale pool properties.']
  contract_execution_date date [note: 'Date when the purchase agreement for the bulk sale pool was executed by all parties.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the bulk sale pool record was first created in the system.']
  data_room_url varchar [note: 'Web address or link to the virtual data room containing due diligence documents for the bulk sale pool.']
  distressed_asset_indicator boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the bulk sale pool consists primarily of distressed or non-performing assets.']
  due_diligence_period_days varchar [note: 'Number of days allocated for the buyer to conduct due diligence on the bulk sale pool properties.']
  earnest_money_deposit decimal(15,2) [note: 'Amount of earnest money deposit required or received to secure the bulk sale pool transaction, in US dollars.']
  exchange_type_1031 boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the bulk sale pool transaction qualifies as a Section 1031 like-kind exchange for tax deferral purposes.']
  expected_closing_date date [note: 'Anticipated date for the final closing and transfer of ownership of the bulk sale pool.']
  geographic_concentration varchar [note: 'Classification indicating the geographic distribution of properties within the bulk sale pool.']
  loan_to_value_ratio_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Average loan-to-value ratio for properties in the bulk sale pool with existing financing, expressed as a percentage.']
  marketing_start_date date [note: 'Date when the bulk sale pool was first actively marketed to potential buyers.']
  modified_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the bulk sale pool record was last modified or updated.']
  occupancy_rate_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Weighted average occupancy rate across all properties in the bulk sale pool, expressed as a percentage.']
  offer_deadline_date date [note: 'Date by which all offers for the bulk sale pool must be submitted.']
  offering_memorandum_url varchar [note: 'Web address or link to the offering memorandum document describing the bulk sale pool investment opportunity.']
  pool_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative description of the bulk sale pool, including property characteristics, investment highlights, and strategic considerations.']
  pool_name varchar [note: 'Human-readable name or title assigned to the bulk sale pool for identification and marketing purposes.']
  pool_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known business identifier for the bulk sale pool, typically used in transaction documents and communications.']
  pool_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the bulk sale pool indicating its stage in the transaction workflow.']
  pool_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the bulk sale pool based on the predominant property type included in the portfolio.']
  price_per_square_foot decimal(10,2) [note: 'Average price per square foot calculated across the bulk sale pool, used for comparative market analysis.']
  price_per_unit decimal(12,2) [note: 'Average price per unit calculated across the bulk sale pool for multi-family or commercial properties.']
  primary_market varchar [note: 'The primary metropolitan statistical area or market where the majority of properties in the pool are located.']
  property_count varchar [note: 'Total number of individual properties included in the bulk sale pool.']
  reo_indicator boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the bulk sale pool consists primarily of bank-owned or REO properties.']
  total_debt_outstanding decimal(18,2) [note: 'Aggregate outstanding debt across all properties in the bulk sale pool, in US dollars.']
  total_square_footage decimal(15,2) [note: 'Aggregate square footage across all properties in the bulk sale pool, measured in square feet.']
  total_units varchar [note: 'Total number of rentable or saleable units across all properties in the bulk sale pool (applicable for multi-family or commercial properties).']

  Note: 'Master reference table for bulk_sale_pool. Referenced by bulk_sale_pool_id.'
}

Table owner.owner {
  owner_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate identifier for each property owner or investor entity in the master registry. Primary key for the owner data product, sourced from Yardi Voyager and MRI Software.']
  domicile_country_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.country. Business justification: Owner domicile country drives FATCA/CRS classification, foreign ownership restrictions, withholding tax rates, and tax treaty eligibility. Compliance officers and relationship managers require this li']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.jurisdiction. Business justification: Owner domicile determines which jurisdiction\'s KYC, FATCA, CRS, and AML regulations apply. Compliance officers use this link to identify applicable regulatory obligations per owner for investor onboar']
  market_segment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.market_segment. Business justification: Investor classification by market segment (core, value-add, opportunistic) drives deal matching, IRR benchmarking, and portfolio reporting. Relationship managers use this to align owner investment pre']
  mri_investor_id varchar [note: 'Source system investor identifier assigned in MRI Software\'s Investment Management module. Used for cross-system reconciliation and data lineage tracking between MRI Software and the Databricks silver layer master registry.']
  relationship_manager_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Every investor/owner in real estate is assigned a relationship manager (employee) for client coverage, CRM reporting, and regulatory accountability. \'relationship_manager\' is a denormalized name strin']
  accredited_investor_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the owner entity qualifies as an accredited investor under SEC Regulation D. True = meets net worth or income thresholds; False = does not qualify. Determines eligibility for private placement offerings and Regulation D exempt securities.']
  aum_tier varchar [note: 'Classification tier based on the owner entity\'s total Assets Under Management (AUM). Used for investor segmentation, relationship management prioritization, and fee schedule assignment. Micro = <$10M; Small = $10M-$100M; Mid = $100M-$1B; Large = $1B-$10B; Mega = >$10B.']
  bank_account_ref varchar [note: 'Masked or tokenized reference to the owner entity\'s designated bank account for distribution payments and capital call receipts. Full account details are stored in the secure payment vault; this field holds only the reference token or last-4 identifier for operational use.']
  beneficial_owner_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this entity is identified as a beneficial owner (i.e., the natural person who ultimately owns or controls the entity) per FinCEN Customer Due Diligence rules. True = beneficial owner identified and disclosed; False = entity is an intermediary or nominee. Critical for AML compliance.']
  beneficial_ownership_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of beneficial ownership held by this entity in the associated investment vehicle or property. Used for FinCEN reporting (25% threshold rule), equity distribution calculations, and waterfall modeling. Expressed as a percentage (e.g., 25.00 = 25%).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the owner record was first created in the system, in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Serves as the authoritative audit trail creation marker for data governance and SOX compliance.']
  distribution_frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency at which investment distributions (income and/or return of capital) are made to the owner entity. Drives cash flow scheduling in Yardi Voyager AR module and investor reporting cycles.']
  distribution_method varchar [note: 'Preferred method for receiving investment distributions. Wire Transfer = international/domestic wire; ACH = Automated Clearing House electronic transfer; Check = paper check; DRIP = Distribution Reinvestment Plan (reinvest distributions into additional units).']
  domicile_state varchar [note: 'State or province of legal domicile or incorporation for the owner entity. Used for state-level tax compliance, regulatory filings, and jurisdictional reporting. Expressed as ISO 3166-2 subdivision code where applicable.']
  entity_type varchar [note: 'Legal classification of the owner entity. Determines applicable regulatory, tax, and reporting obligations. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: individual|corporation|partnership|trust|reit|sovereign_wealth_fund|family_office|joint_venture|llc|government_entity — promote to reference product]']
  esg_mandate_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the owner entity has a formal ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) investment mandate requiring portfolio properties to meet specific sustainability criteria (e.g., LEED, BREEAM certifications). True = ESG mandate in place; False = no formal ESG requirement.']
  fatca_status varchar [note: 'FATCA (Foreign Account Tax Compliance Act) classification of the owner entity. US Person = US citizen/resident/entity; FFI = Foreign Financial Institution; NFFE = Non-Financial Foreign Entity; Exempt = exempt from FATCA reporting; Unknown = not yet determined. Drives IRS Form W-8/W-9 requirements.']
  kyc_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the Know Your Customer (KYC) due diligence process for the owner entity. Required for AML compliance and investor onboarding. Tracks whether identity verification, beneficial ownership disclosure, and sanctions screening have been completed.']
  kyc_verified_date date [note: 'Date on which the KYC verification was last successfully completed and approved for this owner entity. Used to track compliance currency and trigger periodic re-verification workflows.']
  legal_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the owner or investor entity as registered with the relevant government authority. For individuals, this is the full legal name; for entities, this is the registered corporate or trust name. Used as the authoritative identity label across all portfolio records.']
  lei_code varchar [note: '20-character alphanumeric Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) code assigned by a GLEIF-accredited Local Operating Unit. Required for institutional investors and publicly traded REITs for regulatory reporting and counterparty identification in financial transactions.']
  mailing_address_city varchar [note: 'City component of the owner entity\'s primary mailing address. Used in conjunction with state and postal code for address validation and regulatory correspondence.']
  mailing_address_country varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the owner entity\'s primary mailing address. Determines applicable postal regulations, cross-border tax withholding, and FATCA/CRS reporting.']
  mailing_address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the owner entity\'s primary mailing address, including street number and street name. Used for legal notices, distribution checks, K-1 tax forms, and investor correspondence.']
  offboarding_date date [note: 'Date on which the owner entity was formally offboarded or terminated from the platform, following full disposition of holdings and settlement of obligations. Null if the owner is still active.']
  onboarding_date date [note: 'Date on which the owner entity was formally onboarded and activated in the platform, completing all KYC, AML, and documentation requirements. Marks the start of the active relationship lifecycle.']
  onboarding_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the owner entity within the platform. Drives access controls, KYC compliance gating, and operational workflows in Yardi Voyager and MRI Software. Pending = KYC in progress; Active = fully onboarded; Suspended = compliance hold; Inactive = no current holdings; Terminated = relationship ended.']
  owner_class varchar [note: 'High-level investor classification used for portfolio segmentation, AUM (Assets Under Management) reporting, and investment advisory targeting. Distinguishes institutional investors from private individuals, public REITs, family offices, and sovereign wealth funds.']
  politically_exposed_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the owner entity or its beneficial owners are classified as Politically Exposed Persons (PEPs) — individuals who hold or have held prominent public positions. True = PEP identified; False = no PEP association. Triggers enhanced due diligence (EDD) requirements under AML regulations.']
  preferred_asset_classes varchar [note: 'Comma-delimited list of real estate asset classes preferred by the owner for investment (e.g., office, retail, multifamily, industrial, hospitality, mixed-use). Used for deal matching, investment advisory targeting, and portfolio strategy alignment in Argus Enterprise and Salesforce CRM.']
  preferred_hold_period_years varchar [note: 'Owner\'s stated preferred investment hold period in years. Used for portfolio strategy alignment, DCF (Discounted Cash Flow) modeling in Argus Enterprise, and WALT (Weighted Average Lease Term) matching during acquisition underwriting.']
  primary_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for official communications with the owner entity. Used for investor reporting, distribution notices, KYC correspondence, and portal access credentials. Sourced from Yardi Voyager and Salesforce CRM.']
  primary_phone varchar [note: 'Primary telephone number for the owner entity, stored in E.164 international format. Used for investor relations, KYC verification callbacks, and urgent operational communications.']
  qualified_purchaser_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the owner entity qualifies as a qualified purchaser under the Investment Company Act of 1940 (Section 2(a)(51)), typically requiring $5M+ in investments. Determines eligibility for Section 3(c)(7) fund offerings.']
  registration_number varchar [note: 'Official registration or incorporation number issued by the relevant government authority (e.g., Secretary of State, Companies House). Used to verify legal existence and cross-reference with public registries. Applicable to corporations, LLCs, partnerships, and trusts.']
  risk_tolerance varchar [note: 'Owner\'s stated investment risk tolerance profile, aligned with standard CRE (Commercial Real Estate) investment strategy classifications. Core = low risk/stable income; Core Plus = moderate risk; Value Add = higher risk/repositioning; Opportunistic = highest risk/development. Used in Argus Enterprise for portfolio strategy modeling.']
  sanctions_screened_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the owner entity has been screened against OFAC SDN (Specially Designated Nationals) list, EU sanctions lists, and other applicable sanctions databases. True = screening completed with no match; False = not yet screened or match found requiring review.']
  target_cap_rate_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Owner\'s stated target Capitalization Rate (CAP Rate) for property acquisitions, expressed as a percentage (e.g., 5.50 = 5.5%). Used for deal screening and investment underwriting in Argus Enterprise. CAP Rate = NOI / Property Value.']
  target_irr_pct decimal(5,2) [note: 'Owner\'s stated minimum target Internal Rate of Return (IRR) hurdle rate for investment decisions, expressed as a percentage (e.g., 12.00 = 12%). Used in Argus Enterprise for deal screening, investment committee approvals, and portfolio performance benchmarking.']
  tax_exempt_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the owner entity holds tax-exempt status (e.g., pension funds, endowments, sovereign wealth funds, charitable organizations). True = tax-exempt; False = taxable entity. Affects UBTI (Unrelated Business Taxable Income) calculations and withholding tax obligations.']
  tax_id_type varchar [note: 'Classifies the type of tax identification number stored in tax_id. Determines applicable IRS reporting forms and withholding rules. EIN = Employer Identification Number; SSN = Social Security Number; TIN = Tax Identification Number (generic); ITIN = Individual Taxpayer Identification Number.']
  tax_identifier varchar [note: 'Government-issued tax identification number for the owner entity. For US entities: Employer Identification Number (EIN) for corporations/partnerships or Social Security Number (SSN) for individuals. For non-US entities: equivalent Tax Identification Number (TIN). Used for IRS 1099 reporting, withholding tax, and FATCA compliance.']
  trading_name varchar [note: 'Operating or trade name (Doing Business As) used by the owner entity in commercial dealings, if different from the legal name. Common for partnerships, family offices, and REITs operating under a brand name.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the owner record, in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Used for change data capture (CDC), data lineage tracking, and audit compliance.']
  yardi_entity_code varchar [note: 'Source system entity code assigned to this owner in Yardi Voyager. Used for cross-system reconciliation between the silver layer master registry and the Yardi Voyager operational system of record. Enables traceability back to the source.']

  Note: 'SSOT master registry for all property owner and investor identities — individuals, institutional investors, REITs, corporations, trusts, family offices, and sovereign wealth funds. Captures legal entity type, registration details, domicile jurisdiction, tax identification numbers (EIN/SSN/TIN), beneficial ownership flags, AUM classification, onboarding status, and owner preferences (target asset classes, risk tolerance, IRR hurdles, ESG mandates). This is the authoritative golden record for every owner entity across the portfolio, sourced from Yardi Voyager and MRI Software.'
}

Table owner.owner_contact {
  owner_contact_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate identifier for each owner contact record in the Silver Layer lakehouse. Primary key for the owner_contact data product.']
  mailing_country_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.country. Business justification: Contact mailing country determines GDPR applicability, sanctions screening jurisdiction, and communication compliance requirements. Compliance teams require normalized country reference for cross-bord']
  owner_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the parent owner or investor entity (individual, institutional, REIT, JV, or partnership) to whom this contact record belongs. Supports multi-contact hierarchies for institutional owners.']
  consent_obtained_date date [note: 'Date on which explicit consent was obtained from this contact for electronic communications and data processing. Required for GDPR Article 6 lawful basis documentation and CAN-SPAM/TCPA compliance for marketing and investor communications.']
  consent_type varchar [note: 'Type of legal basis or consent obtained for processing and communicating with this contact under GDPR Article 6. Explicit: affirmative opt-in consent. Implied: consent inferred from business relationship. Legitimate_interest: processing based on legitimate business interest. Not_obtained: consent not yet collected.']
  contact_source varchar [note: 'Originating system or channel from which this contact record was created or imported. Supports data lineage tracking and master data management reconciliation across Yardi Voyager, MRI Software, and Salesforce CRM.']
  contact_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of this contact record. Active: contact is current and reachable. Inactive: contact is no longer in use but retained for historical reference. Do_not_contact: contact has opted out or is legally restricted. Pending_verification: contact details awaiting KYC/AML validation. Deceased: individual contact is deceased.']
  contact_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether this contact record represents an individual person (e.g., named representative) or an organizational entity (e.g., law firm, accounting firm) acting on behalf of the owner.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this contact record was first created in the system, in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Supports audit trail requirements under SOX and GDPR data processing records.']
  department varchar [note: 'Business unit or department within the owner\'s organization that this contact represents (e.g., Legal, Finance, Asset Management, Investor Relations, Operations). Supports targeted communication routing for institutional owners.']
  do_not_contact_reason varchar [note: 'Reason code explaining why this contact has been flagged as do-not-contact. Applicable when contact_status is \'do_not_contact\'. Supports GDPR right-to-erasure and CAN-SPAM opt-out compliance tracking.']
  effective_from_date date [note: 'Date from which this contact record is considered active and valid for the owner entity. Supports temporal validity tracking for contact records, particularly relevant when contacts change roles or when new authorized representatives are designated.']
  effective_to_date date [note: 'Date on which this contact record ceases to be active for the owner entity. Null indicates the contact is currently active with no defined end date. Used to manage contact record lifecycle and historical audit trails.']
  external_contact_ref varchar [note: 'Identifier for this contact record in the originating source system (e.g., Yardi Voyager contact ID, Salesforce CRM contact ID, MRI contact code). Supports cross-system reconciliation and data lineage in the Silver Layer.']
  first_name varchar [note: 'Given name of the individual contact person. Applicable when contact_type is \'individual\'. Used for personalized correspondence and legal documentation.']
  is_authorized_signatory boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this contact is authorized to execute legal documents, contracts, and agreements on behalf of the owner entity. Critical for DocuSign CLM workflow routing and lease execution authorization under SNDA and ALTA requirements.']
  is_kyc_verified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this contact has completed the Know Your Customer (KYC) identity verification process as part of investor onboarding. Required for AML compliance and regulatory reporting for REIT investors and institutional owners.']
  is_primary_contact boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this contact record is designated as the primary point of contact for the owner entity. Only one contact per owner should have this flag set to True. Used to determine default routing for communications and notifications.']
  job_title varchar [note: 'Professional title or designation of the individual contact (e.g., Chief Financial Officer, Asset Manager, General Counsel, Investor Relations Director). Supports routing of communications to the appropriate decision-maker.']
  kyc_expiry_date date [note: 'Date on which the current KYC verification for this contact expires and re-verification is required. Supports proactive compliance management and automated re-verification workflow triggers.']
  kyc_verification_date date [note: 'Date on which the KYC identity verification was completed for this contact. Used to track compliance currency and trigger re-verification workflows when KYC records expire per regulatory requirements.']
  last_name varchar [note: 'Family name or surname of the individual contact person. Applicable when contact_type is \'individual\'. Used in combination with first_name for full legal name construction.']
  linkedin_url varchar [note: 'LinkedIn professional profile URL for this contact. Used by brokerage and investor relations teams for professional background verification, relationship management, and deal sourcing activities tracked in Salesforce CRM.']
  mailing_address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the mailing address for this contact, typically containing the street number and street name. Used for formal correspondence, legal notices, distribution of financial statements, and regulatory filings.']
  mailing_address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the mailing address for this contact, typically containing suite, unit, floor, or building number. Supplements mailing_address_line1 for complete address specification.']
  mailing_city varchar [note: 'City or municipality of the mailing address for this contact. Used in conjunction with mailing_state and mailing_postal_code for complete address validation and geographic reporting.']
  mailing_postal_code varchar [note: 'ZIP code or postal code of the mailing address for this contact. Used for mail delivery, geographic segmentation, and regulatory jurisdiction determination.']
  mailing_state varchar [note: 'State, province, or territory of the mailing address for this contact. For US addresses, use the two-letter USPS state abbreviation (e.g., CA, NY, TX). For international addresses, use the appropriate regional subdivision code.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for capturing additional context, special instructions, or relationship notes about this contact. Examples include communication preferences, relationship history, or special handling instructions for investor relations. Classified confidential due to potential sensitivity of relationship notes.']
  organization_name varchar [note: 'Legal or trading name of the organization acting as the contact, applicable when contact_type is \'organization\' (e.g., law firm, accounting firm, property management company). Also used for the employer/firm name when the contact is an individual representative of an institution.']
  preferred_communication_channel varchar [note: 'The contact\'s preferred method for receiving communications from the real estate organization. Drives automated notification routing in Yardi Voyager and Salesforce CRM. Options: email (electronic mail), phone (voice call), mail (postal mail), portal (owner/investor portal), fax.']
  preferred_language varchar [note: 'BCP 47 language tag representing the contact\'s preferred language for communications (e.g., en-US, fr-FR, es-MX, zh-CN). Supports multilingual correspondence for international investors and cross-border real estate transactions.']
  primary_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for this contact. Used for routine correspondence, distribution of financial reports, lease notifications, and investor communications. Governed by GDPR and CAN-SPAM Act for electronic communications.']
  primary_phone varchar [note: 'Primary telephone number for this contact in E.164 international format. Used for direct voice communication, urgent notifications, and deal-related discussions. Governed by GDPR and TCPA.']
  primary_phone_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the primary phone number indicating the type of line: mobile (cell phone), office (main switchboard), direct (direct dial line), home (residential), or fax. Supports appropriate communication channel selection.']
  role_type varchar [note: 'Functional role of this contact within the owner entity hierarchy. Determines routing of communications: primary (main point of contact), legal (attorney or legal counsel), financial (CFO, accountant, or investor relations), operational (property or asset manager), emergency (24/7 escalation), secondary (backup contact). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: primary|legal|financial|operational|emergency|secondary — promote to reference product if additional roles are needed]']
  salutation varchar [note: 'Formal salutation or honorific prefix for the individual contact (e.g., Mr., Ms., Dr., Prof.). Used in formal correspondence, legal notices, and investor communications to ensure appropriate professional address.']
  secondary_email varchar [note: 'Alternate or backup email address for this contact. Used when primary email is undeliverable or for specific communication types (e.g., legal notices, financial statements). Governed by GDPR.']
  secondary_phone varchar [note: 'Alternate telephone number for this contact in E.164 international format. Used as a backup contact channel or for a different communication type (e.g., mobile vs. office). Governed by GDPR and TCPA.']
  secondary_phone_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the secondary phone number indicating the type of line: mobile, office, direct, home, or fax. Supports appropriate communication channel selection when primary phone is unavailable.']
  suffix varchar [note: 'Name suffix for the individual contact (e.g., Jr., Sr., III, Esq., CPA, CFA). Used in formal legal and financial correspondence to accurately represent the contact\'s full legal name.']
  time_zone varchar [note: 'IANA time zone identifier for the contact\'s primary location (e.g., America/New_York, Europe/London, Asia/Singapore). Used to schedule communications, meetings, and automated notifications at appropriate local times for international investors and cross-border transactions.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this contact record was most recently modified, in ISO 8601 format with timezone offset (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Supports change tracking, data quality monitoring, and audit trail requirements under SOX.']

  Note: 'Contact information records for owner entities — primary and secondary contacts, mailing addresses, email addresses, phone numbers, preferred communication channels, and contact role types (primary, legal, financial, operational). Supports multi-contact hierarchies for institutional owners with multiple authorized representatives.'
}

Table owner.owner_ownership_interest {
  owner_ownership_interest_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated surrogate identifier for each ownership interest record. Primary key for the ownership_interest data product.']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific property or real estate asset in which the ownership interest is held. Enables property-level ownership attribution and portfolio aggregation.']
  currency_code_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.currency_code. Business justification: Ownership interest currency drives multi-currency equity valuation, FX rate lookups for USD reporting, and investor capital account statements. Fund accountants require normalized currency reference f']
  dev_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to development.dev_project. Business justification: JV equity interests and promote structures in development are tracked at the project level, often before a stabilized asset exists. Linking ownership_interest to dev_project enables promote waterfall ']
  fund_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to investment.fund. Business justification: Direct fund investments (without an intermediate vehicle) require ownership_interest to reference the fund for K-1 allocation, IRR attribution, and LP capital account statements. Real estate fund oper']
  investment_vehicle_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the investment vehicle (e.g., REIT, fund, JV entity, partnership) through which the ownership interest is held, when ownership is indirect. Nullable when ownership is direct.']
  owner_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the owner or investor entity holding this ownership interest. Links to the owner master record representing an individual, institution, REIT, JV entity, or partnership.']
  ownership_structure_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to owner.ownership_structure. Business justification: An ownership interest (equity stake in a property or investment) is held WITHIN a specific legal/organizational ownership structure (LLC, JV, REIT, partnership). ownership_structure is the parent enti']
  portfolio_asset_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to investment.portfolio_asset. Business justification: An ownership interest in a property corresponds to a portfolio_asset record in the investment domain. This link enables cross-domain reconciliation of equity ownership percentages, acquisition costs, ']
  tenure_type_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.tenure_type. Business justification: Ownership interest tenure type (fee simple, leasehold, condominium) determines LTV limits, title insurance requirements, CMBS eligibility, and REIT qualification. Underwriters and asset managers requi']
  transaction_type_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.transaction_type. Business justification: Ownership interest acquisition transaction type (arm\'s length purchase, 1031 exchange, foreclosure, contribution) determines tax basis treatment, SEC reportability, and due diligence requirements. Tax']
  unit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to property.unit. Business justification: In condominium and co-op regimes, owners hold title to specific units. Unit-level ownership tracking is required for condo association governance, unit-level title insurance, and HOA fee allocation. A']
  acquisition_date date [note: 'The date on which the ownership interest was legally acquired or became effective. Used for cost basis calculation, holding period determination, capital gains tax reporting, and IRR (Internal Rate of Return) analysis.']
  beneficial_owner_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the owner holds this interest as a beneficial owner (True), meaning they enjoy the economic benefits of ownership without holding legal title directly. Critical for FinCEN beneficial ownership reporting and GDPR data subject identification.']
  co_ownership_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ownership interest exists within a co-ownership arrangement (True), meaning multiple owners hold interests in the same property simultaneously. Triggers co-owner reconciliation and consent requirement workflows.']
  controlling_interest_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ownership interest constitutes a controlling interest (True), typically defined as ownership exceeding 50% or as defined by the governing JV or partnership agreement. Triggers consolidation requirements under FASB ASC 810.']
  cost_basis_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The original acquisition cost of the ownership interest, including purchase price, transaction costs, and capitalized improvements attributable to this interest. Used for depreciation schedules, capital gains calculation, and CAPEX (Capital Expenditure) tracking. Expressed in the operating currency.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this ownership interest record was first created in the system. Supports audit trail, data lineage, and SOX compliance requirements. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  disposition_date date [note: 'The date on which the ownership interest was disposed of, transferred, or terminated. Nullable for active interests. Used for capital gains computation, REIT disposition reporting, and portfolio lifecycle tracking.']
  effective_from date [note: 'The date from which this ownership interest record version is legally and operationally effective. Supports bi-temporal modeling and ownership history reconstruction for audit and compliance purposes.']
  effective_until date [note: 'The date until which this ownership interest record version is legally and operationally effective. Null indicates the record is currently active with no known end date. Supports bi-temporal modeling and ownership history reconstruction.']
  encumbrance_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The outstanding monetary value of the encumbrance (e.g., mortgage balance, lien amount) against this ownership interest. Used for LTV (Loan-to-Value Ratio) calculation, net equity determination, and DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio) reporting. Null when encumbrance_type is none.']
  encumbrance_type varchar [note: 'The type of encumbrance or lien affecting this ownership interest, if any. None indicates a clear title. Mortgage, lien, easement, covenant, and pledge represent common encumbrance categories affecting transferability and value. Used for title due diligence and DSCR (Debt Service Coverage Ratio) analysis.']
  equity_value_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The current estimated equity value of the ownership interest, representing the owner\'s proportional share of the property\'s NAV (Net Asset Value) net of encumbrances. Updated upon revaluation events. Used for investor reporting, LTV (Loan-to-Value Ratio) calculations, and portfolio NAV reporting.']
  interest_reference_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known business identifier for this ownership interest record, used in legal documents, title records, and investor reporting. Sourced from Yardi Voyager or MRI Software ownership module.']
  interest_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the legal form of ownership interest held. Fee simple denotes absolute ownership; leasehold denotes ownership of a lease term; fractional denotes partial undivided interest; beneficial denotes equitable ownership without legal title; tenancy in common and joint tenancy denote co-ownership structures. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: fee_simple|leasehold|fractional|beneficial|tenancy_in_common|joint_tenancy|usufruct|ground_lease — promote to reference product]']
  jv_structure_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ownership interest is held through a Joint Venture (JV) structure (True). Enables identification of JV-governed interests requiring separate JV agreement compliance, promote calculations, and consolidated reporting under FASB ASC 810.']
  kyc_status varchar [note: 'The current Know Your Customer (KYC) onboarding verification status for the owner associated with this interest. Required for AML (Anti-Money Laundering) compliance and investor onboarding. Sourced from the investor onboarding workflow in Salesforce CRM or MRI Software.']
  kyc_verified_date date [note: 'The date on which the KYC verification for the owner was last approved or renewed. Used to track KYC expiry and trigger re-verification workflows in compliance with AML regulations.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional context, legal annotations, or operational remarks related to this ownership interest record. Used by asset managers and legal teams to document nuances not captured in structured fields.']
  owner_ownership_interest_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the ownership interest record. Pending: interest recorded but not yet legally effective. Active: interest is legally valid and in force. Encumbered: interest is subject to a lien, mortgage, or other encumbrance. Disputed: interest is subject to legal challenge. Transferred: interest has been conveyed to another party. Terminated: interest has been extinguished.']
  ownership_agreement_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier for the legal ownership agreement, deed, or instrument governing this interest (e.g., deed number, JV agreement ID, partnership agreement reference). Links to DocuSign CLM or document management system for full contract retrieval.']
  ownership_percentage decimal(7,4) [note: 'The percentage equity stake held by the owner in the subject property or investment vehicle, expressed as a decimal percentage (e.g., 25.0000 = 25%). Must sum to 100% across all active co-owners of the same property. Critical for NOI (Net Operating Income) distribution, capital call allocation, and investor reporting.']
  previous_status varchar [note: 'The status of the ownership interest immediately prior to the most recent status transition. Supports full status transition history and audit trail requirements without requiring a separate history table for the latest transition.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'Identifies the operational system of record from which this ownership interest record was originated or last updated (e.g., YARDI for Yardi Voyager, MRI for MRI Software, ARGUS for Argus Enterprise). Supports data lineage and reconciliation in the Silver Layer lakehouse.']
  source_system_record_code varchar [note: 'The native primary key or record identifier of this ownership interest in the originating operational system (e.g., Yardi entity ID, MRI ownership record ID). Enables bi-directional traceability between the Silver Layer and source systems for reconciliation and audit.']
  status_change_date date [note: 'The effective date of the most recent status transition for this ownership interest record. Used for audit trail reconstruction, compliance reporting, and ownership lifecycle analytics.']
  status_change_reason varchar [note: 'Free-text or coded reason describing why the ownership interest status was changed (e.g., \'Mortgage recorded against title\', \'Ownership transferred via sale\', \'Legal dispute filed\'). Required for audit trail completeness and compliance documentation.']
  status_changed_by varchar [note: 'The username or user identifier of the individual who executed the most recent status change on this ownership interest record. Required for SOX audit trail and data governance accountability.']
  supporting_document_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or URL to the supporting legal document (deed, transfer instrument, court order, JV agreement amendment) that substantiates the most recent status change. Links to DocuSign CLM or document management repository.']
  title_insurance_policy_number varchar [note: 'The policy number of the title insurance policy covering this ownership interest. Issued by an ALTA-compliant title insurer. Used for claims management, due diligence documentation, and legal dispute resolution.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this ownership interest record was most recently modified. Used for change data capture (CDC), Silver Layer incremental processing, and audit trail maintenance. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  vesting_end_date date [note: 'The date on which the ownership interest becomes fully vested under the vesting schedule. Applicable only when vesting_schedule_flag is True. Null if vesting is perpetual or not applicable.']
  vesting_schedule_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ownership interest is subject to a vesting schedule (True) or is fully vested at acquisition (False). Relevant for employee equity programs, JV promote structures, and deferred ownership arrangements.']
  vesting_start_date date [note: 'The date on which the vesting schedule for this ownership interest commences. Applicable only when vesting_schedule_flag is True. Used to calculate vested percentage over time for JV promote and equity program tracking.']
  vesting_type varchar [note: 'The legal manner in which title to the ownership interest is held (vested). Determines rights of survivorship, transferability, and tax treatment. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: sole_ownership|community_property|tenancy_in_common|joint_tenancy|trust|corporate|partnership|llc|reit_unit — promote to reference product]']

  Note: 'Records the equity stake or ownership interest held by an owner in a specific property or investment vehicle, including full status lifecycle and audit history. Captures ownership percentage, interest type (fee simple, leasehold, fractional, beneficial), acquisition date, cost basis, vesting schedule, co-ownership arrangement flags, current status (pending, active, encumbered, disputed, transferred, terminated), and complete status transition history with previous status, new status, effective dates, change reasons, changed-by user, and supporting document references. Central to tracking fractional ownership, JV structures, and REIT unit holdings at the property level. Enables full ownership lifecycle traceability for legal, compliance, and audit purposes.'
}

Table owner.ownership_structure {
  ownership_structure_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the ownership structure record. Primary key for the ownership_structure data product within the owner domain.']
  currency_code_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.currency_code. Business justification: Ownership structure functional currency drives NAV calculation, AUM reporting, and investor capital account statements. Fund accountants require normalized currency reference for multi-currency fund s']
  governing_geographic_hierarchy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.geographic_hierarchy. Business justification: Ownership structure formation jurisdiction determines applicable state/local tax obligations, LLC/LP filing requirements, and regulatory oversight. Legal and tax teams require normalized geographic hi']
  investment_vehicle_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.investment_vehicle. Business justification: Ownership structure vehicle type (REIT, LP, LLC, DST) determines SEC registration requirements, tax treatment, ERISA eligibility, and investor qualification rules. Fund administrators and compliance o']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.jurisdiction. Business justification: Ownership structures are formed and governed in specific jurisdictions determining applicable formation rules, tax treatment, and regulatory reporting. The governing_jurisdiction plain-text column is ']
  legal_entity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.legal_entity. Business justification: Ownership structures (LLCs, LPs, REITs, JVs) are registered as legal entities. Financial consolidation, NOI reporting, tax filings, and NAV calculations are produced at the legal entity level. A real ']
  managing_member_owner_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to owner.owner. Business justification: ownership_structure has managing_member_name (STRING) and managing_member_entity_type fields. The managing member of an LLC, JV, or partnership is typically a registered owner entity in the system. Ad']
  primary_contact_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Each real estate ownership structure (fund, JV, LLC) has a designated internal employee as primary contact for investor communications, distributions, and regulatory filings. Linking to workforce.empl']
  regulatory_framework_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.regulatory_framework. Business justification: Ownership structures (REITs, private funds, DSTs) are governed by specific regulatory frameworks (SEC Reg D, ERISA, Investment Company Act). Compliance officers require this link to track applicable r']
  regulatory_obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_obligation. Business justification: Ownership structures (REITs, LPs, LLCs) must comply with specific regulatory obligations (REIT qualification rules, SEC reporting, state formation requirements). Compliance teams track which regulator']
  asset_class varchar [note: 'The primary real estate asset class held within this ownership structure. Used for portfolio segmentation, benchmarking, and regulatory reporting. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: office|retail|industrial|multifamily|hospitality|mixed_use|land|healthcare|self_storage — promote to reference product]']
  aum decimal(18,2) [note: 'The total gross asset value of real estate assets held within this ownership structure, representing Assets Under Management (AUM). Used for fee calculations, portfolio reporting, and SEC/regulatory disclosures.']
  beneficial_ownership_disclosed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether beneficial ownership information (individuals owning 25%+ equity) has been disclosed per FinCEN\'s Corporate Transparency Act requirements. Mandatory for AML compliance and investor onboarding.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this ownership structure record was first created in the data platform. Follows ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Used for audit trails, SOX compliance, and data lineage tracking.']
  dissolution_date date [note: 'The date on which the ownership structure was legally dissolved or wound down. Null for active structures. Used for lifecycle tracking, tax reporting, and portfolio close-out analytics.']
  distribution_frequency varchar [note: 'The scheduled frequency at which cash distributions are made to equity holders of the ownership structure. Governs investor cash flow planning and AR/AP processing in Yardi Voyager and MRI Software.']
  esg_classification varchar [note: 'The ESG rating or classification tier assigned to the ownership structure based on environmental, social, and governance criteria. Increasingly required for institutional investor mandates, LEED/BREEAM alignment, and SEC climate disclosure rules.']
  extension_option_years varchar [note: 'The number of years by which the fund term may be extended at the managing member\'s discretion, as specified in the operating agreement. Used for investment horizon modeling and investor communication.']
  formation_date date [note: 'The date on which the ownership structure was legally formed or incorporated. Used to calculate entity age, determine applicable regulatory frameworks, and validate operating agreement timelines.']
  fund_term_years varchar [note: 'The contractual term length of the ownership structure in years, as defined in the operating agreement. Applicable primarily to closed-end funds, LPs, and JV structures. Used for WALT/WALE calculations and investment horizon planning.']
  investment_strategy varchar [note: 'The risk-return investment strategy classification of the ownership structure. Determines underwriting assumptions, target IRR thresholds, and portfolio reporting categories in Argus Enterprise and MRI Software.']
  kyc_status varchar [note: 'The current KYC/AML compliance verification status for the ownership structure entity. Required for investor onboarding, anti-money laundering compliance, and FinCEN beneficial ownership rule adherence.']
  kyc_verified_date date [note: 'The date on which KYC/AML verification was last completed and approved for this ownership structure. Used to track compliance currency and trigger re-verification workflows per regulatory requirements.']
  managing_member_entity_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the managing member as an individual person or a legal entity type. Determines KYC/AML requirements, beneficial ownership disclosure obligations, and governance structure.']
  managing_member_name varchar [note: 'The name of the designated managing member, general partner, or trustee responsible for day-to-day decisions and fiduciary obligations of the ownership structure. Critical for governance, legal notices, and investor communications.']
  nav decimal(18,2) [note: 'The Net Asset Value (NAV) of the ownership structure, calculated as total asset value minus total liabilities. Used for unit pricing in open-end funds, investor redemption calculations, and REIT reporting. Sourced from Argus Enterprise valuations.']
  nav_as_of_date date [note: 'The valuation date as of which the NAV figure was calculated. Required for temporal accuracy in investor reporting and regulatory filings. NAV values are point-in-time and must be paired with this date.']
  number_of_members varchar [note: 'The total count of equity members, partners, or beneficial owners participating in the ownership structure. Used for governance quorum calculations, K-1 distribution processing, and regulatory reporting thresholds.']
  operating_agreement_ref varchar [note: 'Reference identifier or document number for the governing operating agreement, partnership agreement, or trust deed associated with this ownership structure. Links to DocuSign CLM or document management system for full document retrieval.']
  ownership_structure_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the ownership structure. Drives eligibility for new property acquisitions, investor distributions, and regulatory filings. Active structures are operational; dissolved structures have completed wind-down.']
  preferred_return_rate decimal(8,4) [note: 'The annual preferred return percentage (hurdle rate) guaranteed to limited partners or preferred equity holders before the managing member participates in profits. Expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.0800 = 8%). Key input for IRR and DCF waterfall modeling in Argus Enterprise.']
  promote_percentage decimal(8,4) [note: 'The percentage of profits allocated to the managing member or general partner above the preferred return threshold, commonly known as the carried interest or promote. Expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.2000 = 20%). Used in waterfall distribution modeling.']
  publicly_traded boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the ownership structure\'s equity interests are publicly traded on a stock exchange. Determines SEC reporting obligations (10-K, 10-Q), SOX compliance requirements, and CMBS/RMBS disclosure rules.']
  registered_address varchar [note: 'The official registered address of the ownership structure entity as filed with the governing jurisdiction\'s secretary of state or equivalent authority. Used for legal notices, regulatory filings, and tax correspondence.']
  registration_number varchar [note: 'The official registration or filing number assigned by the governing jurisdiction\'s secretary of state or equivalent authority (e.g., LLC filing number, LP certificate number). Used for legal verification and regulatory compliance.']
  reit_qualified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this ownership structure qualifies as a Real Estate Investment Trust (REIT) under IRS Section 856-860 and SEC regulations. Drives tax treatment, distribution requirements (90% of taxable income), and SEC reporting obligations.']
  source_system_code varchar [note: 'The native identifier of this ownership structure record in the originating operational system (e.g., Yardi Voyager entity ID, MRI Software entity code, Argus Enterprise fund ID). Enables cross-system lineage tracing and reconciliation.']
  source_system_name varchar [note: 'The name of the operational system of record from which this ownership structure record was sourced. Used for data lineage, audit trails, and Silver layer reconciliation in the Databricks Lakehouse.']
  structure_code varchar [note: 'Externally-known alphanumeric code uniquely identifying the ownership structure across systems such as Yardi Voyager, MRI Software, and Argus Enterprise. Used for cross-system reconciliation and reporting.']
  structure_name varchar [note: 'The full legal name of the ownership structure entity (e.g., \'Maple Grove Realty LLC\', \'Westside JV Partners LP\'). Used in legal documents, operating agreements, and investor reporting.']
  structure_type varchar [note: 'Legal and organizational classification of the ownership structure. Determines governance rules, tax treatment, and reporting obligations. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: single_owner|joint_venture|limited_partnership|llc|reit|tenancy_in_common|trust|general_partnership — promote to reference product]']
  target_equity_multiple decimal(8,4) [note: 'The target equity multiple (total distributions divided by total invested capital) for the ownership structure as underwritten. Expressed as a ratio (e.g., 2.0000 = 2.0x). Used alongside IRR for investor return benchmarking.']
  target_irr decimal(8,4) [note: 'The target Internal Rate of Return (IRR) for the ownership structure as underwritten in the investment thesis. Expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.1500 = 15%). Used for performance benchmarking and investor reporting in Argus Enterprise.']
  tax_identification_number varchar [note: 'The federal Employer Identification Number (EIN) or equivalent tax identification number assigned to the ownership structure entity. Required for IRS filings, K-1 distributions, and REIT qualification reporting.']
  ticker_symbol varchar [note: 'The stock exchange ticker symbol for publicly traded ownership structures (REITs). Null for private structures. Used for market data integration with CoStar Suite and financial reporting.']
  total_committed_capital decimal(18,2) [note: 'The total capital committed by all equity partners or members to the ownership structure, expressed in the base currency. Used for LTV calculations, DSCR analysis, and investor reporting in Argus Enterprise and MRI Software.']
  total_contributed_capital decimal(18,2) [note: 'The total capital actually funded and contributed by all equity partners or members to date. Distinct from committed capital; the difference represents uncalled capital. Used for NAV calculations and investor reporting.']
  total_equity_interests varchar [note: 'The total number of authorized equity interests, units, shares, or membership interests in the ownership structure. Used to calculate individual ownership percentages and dilution analysis.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this ownership structure record was last modified in the data platform. Follows ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Used for change tracking, SOX compliance, and incremental data processing.']

  Note: 'Defines the legal and organizational structure through which ownership is held — single owner, joint venture, limited partnership (LP), LLC, REIT, tenancy-in-common (TIC), or trust. Captures structure type, formation date, governing jurisdiction, operating agreement reference, managing member designation, and dissolution date. Enables modeling of complex multi-tier ownership hierarchies.'
}

Table owner.beneficial_owner {
  beneficial_owner_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated surrogate identifier for the ultimate beneficial owner (UBO) record within the real estate ownership registry.']
  compliance_program_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.program. Business justification: AML compliance programs govern beneficial ownership verification processes, recertification schedules, and risk-based review triggers. Program managers track beneficial ownership completion rates and ']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.jurisdiction. Business justification: Beneficial ownership disclosure thresholds and rules vary by jurisdiction. Compliance teams need the structured jurisdiction reference to apply correct disclosure rules, filing deadlines, and penalty ']
  legal_entity_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the legal entity (company, trust, partnership, REIT, or shell company) for which this beneficial ownership record is being declared. Links to the owner entity registry.']
  nationality_country_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.country. Business justification: Beneficial owner nationality drives AML risk rating, sanctions screening jurisdiction, FATF membership assessment, and CTA filing requirements. Compliance officers require normalized country reference']
  owner_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to owner.owner. Business justification: beneficial_owner tracks ultimate beneficial ownership (UBO) records for entities. While it links to finance.legal_entity via entity_id (the legal entity being analyzed), the beneficial owner themselve']
  regulatory_framework_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.regulatory_framework. Business justification: Beneficial ownership disclosure is governed by specific regulatory frameworks (FinCEN CTA, EU AMLD, UK PSC Register). Compliance officers require this link to track which regulatory regime mandates th']
  regulatory_obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_obligation. Business justification: Beneficial ownership disclosure is mandated by specific regulations (FinCEN CTA, FATCA, EU AMLD). The beneficial_owner has cta_filing_status and cta_filing_reference but no FK to the regulatory_obliga']
  verified_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: FinCEN/CTA beneficial ownership verification must be performed and attested by a credentialed compliance employee. Linking to workforce.employee supports AML audit trails, regulatory examination readi']
  aml_review_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent periodic AML/KYC review conducted for this beneficial owner. Frequency is determined by risk tier (e.g., annual for HIGH/VERY_HIGH, biennial for LOW/MEDIUM). Drives compliance calendar and escalation workflows.']
  cessation_date date [note: 'Date on which this beneficial ownership interest ceased — i.e., when the individual divested, transferred, or otherwise relinquished the ownership stake or control rights. Null if ownership is still active. Triggers updated CTA filing obligation.']
  control_basis varchar [note: 'The legal or contractual basis through which the beneficial owner exercises control over the reporting entity. Includes equity interest, voting rights, senior officer authority, board control, trust instrument, or contractual arrangement. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: EQUITY_INTEREST|VOTING_RIGHTS|SENIOR_OFFICER|BOARD_CONTROL|TRUST_CONTROL|CONTRACT|POWER_OF_ATTORNEY — promote to reference product]']
  control_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the beneficial owner exercises control directly (holding shares/units in the reporting entity) or indirectly (through intermediate holding entities, trusts, or nominee arrangements). Required for multi-tier holding structure analysis.']
