  country_of_residence varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code for the beneficial owner\'s primary country of residence. Used for tax residency determination, FATCA/CRS reporting, and jurisdictional risk classification.']
  cta_exempt_reason varchar [note: 'Reason code or description explaining why the reporting entity qualifies for a CTA exemption (e.g., large operating company, SEC-reporting company, regulated financial institution, inactive entity). Populated only when cta_filing_status = EXEMPT.']
  cta_filing_date date [note: 'Date on which the FinCEN Beneficial Ownership Information (BOI) report was filed or last updated for this beneficial owner under the Corporate Transparency Act.']
  cta_filing_reference varchar [note: 'FinCEN-assigned reference number for the Beneficial Ownership Information (BOI) report filed under the Corporate Transparency Act. Used to cross-reference regulatory submissions and track filing history.']
  cta_filing_status varchar [note: 'Status of the FinCEN Beneficial Ownership Information (BOI) report filing under the Corporate Transparency Act for this beneficial owner record. NOT_REQUIRED = entity is exempt; PENDING = filing due; FILED = initial report submitted; UPDATED = updated report filed; EXEMPT = entity qualifies for CTA exemption.']
  date_of_birth date [note: 'Date of birth of the beneficial owner individual. Required for identity verification under FinCEN CTA and AML/KYC onboarding procedures.']
  disclosure_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether this beneficial owner record is subject to mandatory regulatory disclosure obligations under FinCEN CTA, SEC beneficial ownership rules, or other applicable regulations. Drives compliance workflow routing.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date on which this beneficial ownership interest became effective — i.e., when the individual first acquired the ownership stake or control rights in the reporting entity. Used for ownership timeline analysis and regulatory reporting.']
  full_legal_name varchar [note: 'Full legal name of the individual identified as the ultimate beneficial owner (UBO) as it appears on government-issued identification documents. Required for FinCEN CTA and AML/KYC compliance.']
  intermediate_entity_name varchar [note: 'Name of the intermediate holding entity (SPV, LLC, trust, or holding company) through which the beneficial owner exercises indirect ownership or control. Populated for indirect ownership structures; null for direct ownership. Critical for multi-tier holding structure mapping.']
  is_politically_exposed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the beneficial owner is classified as a Politically Exposed Person (PEP) — a current or former senior government official, state-owned enterprise executive, or immediate family member thereof. PEP status triggers enhanced due diligence (EDD) under AML regulations.']
  is_senior_officer boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the beneficial owner qualifies as a senior officer (CEO, CFO, COO, General Counsel, or equivalent) of the reporting entity, triggering mandatory CTA disclosure regardless of ownership percentage.']
  kyc_expiry_date date [note: 'Date on which the current KYC verification expires and a periodic refresh is required. Typically set 1–3 years from verification date based on risk tier. Drives automated KYC renewal workflows.']
  kyc_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the KYC identity verification process for this beneficial owner. Drives onboarding workflow, investment eligibility, and regulatory compliance gating. PENDING = not yet submitted; IN_REVIEW = under compliance review; VERIFIED = identity confirmed; REJECTED = failed verification; EXPIRED = verification lapsed and requires renewal.']
  kyc_verified_date date [note: 'Date on which the beneficial owner\'s identity was successfully verified and KYC status was set to VERIFIED. Used to calculate KYC refresh due dates and track compliance timelines.']
  national_id_expiry_date date [note: 'Expiration date of the government-issued identification document provided by the beneficial owner. Used to flag expired documents requiring re-verification during periodic KYC refresh cycles.']
  national_id_issuing_country varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of the jurisdiction that issued the beneficial owner\'s identification document. Required for FinCEN CTA filing and cross-border AML risk assessment.']
  national_id_number varchar [note: 'Unique number from the government-issued identification document (passport, national ID, driver\'s license, SSN, or TIN) provided by the beneficial owner. Stored encrypted; used for identity verification and regulatory filing.']
  national_id_type varchar [note: 'Type of government-issued identification document provided by the beneficial owner for identity verification. Acceptable document types per FinCEN CTA include passport, national ID card, driver\'s license, and tax identification number.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for compliance officers to record observations, escalation rationale, investigation findings, or other contextual information related to this beneficial owner record. Not used for structured data.']
  owner_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the beneficial owner as an individual natural person, trust beneficiary, estate beneficiary, or nominee arrangement. Determines the applicable KYC documentation requirements and regulatory disclosure obligations.']
  ownership_agreement_ref varchar [note: 'Reference number or document identifier for the legal agreement (shareholder agreement, partnership agreement, trust deed, or operating agreement) that establishes and evidences the beneficial ownership interest. Links to DocuSign CLM or document management system.']
  ownership_percentage decimal(7,4) [note: 'Percentage of equity interest or voting rights held by this beneficial owner in the reporting entity. FinCEN CTA mandates disclosure for individuals holding 25% or more. Used for UBO threshold screening and regulatory filing.']
  ownership_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of this beneficial ownership record. ACTIVE = ownership interest is current and valid; CEASED = ownership has been divested or transferred; SUSPENDED = ownership rights temporarily restricted; UNDER_REVIEW = record flagged for compliance investigation.']
  ownership_threshold_met boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the beneficial owner meets or exceeds the 25% ownership or control threshold mandated by FinCEN CTA for mandatory UBO disclosure. True = threshold met; False = below threshold but tracked for AML purposes.']
  ownership_tier_level varchar [note: 'Numeric level in the ownership hierarchy at which this beneficial owner sits (1 = direct ownership, 2 = one intermediate entity, 3 = two intermediate entities, etc.). Used for multi-tier holding structure analysis and UBO chain tracing.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this beneficial owner record was first created in the system, in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Provides audit trail for regulatory compliance and data lineage tracking.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to this beneficial owner record, in ISO 8601 format (yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX). Used for change tracking, audit trails, and triggering updated CTA filings when ownership data changes.']
  residential_address varchar [note: 'Full residential address of the beneficial owner as provided during KYC onboarding. Required for FinCEN CTA beneficial ownership reporting and AML identity verification.']
  risk_tier varchar [note: 'Risk classification assigned to the beneficial owner based on AML/KYC risk factors including PEP status, sanctions exposure, jurisdiction risk, ownership complexity, and transaction patterns. Determines the level of due diligence (standard, enhanced) and KYC refresh frequency.']
  sanctions_match_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the beneficial owner returned a positive or potential match during sanctions screening against OFAC, EU, UN, or other watchlists. A True value triggers escalation to the compliance team for enhanced due diligence.']
  sanctions_screened boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the beneficial owner has been screened against OFAC SDN list, EU consolidated sanctions list, UN sanctions list, and other applicable watchlists as part of AML/KYC onboarding and periodic review.']
  source_of_funds varchar [note: 'Declared origin of the specific funds used to acquire the ownership interest in the reporting entity (e.g., bank transfer from operating account, proceeds from property sale, loan facility). Distinct from source of wealth; required for AML transaction monitoring.']
  source_of_wealth varchar [note: 'Declared source of the beneficial owner\'s wealth used to fund the ownership interest (e.g., business income, inheritance, real estate proceeds, investment returns). Required for enhanced due diligence (EDD) on high-risk and PEP-classified beneficial owners.']
  tax_identification_number varchar [note: 'Tax Identification Number (TIN) or equivalent tax reference number for the beneficial owner, used for FATCA, OECD Common Reporting Standard (CRS), and domestic tax reporting obligations. May be SSN, EIN, or foreign TIN depending on jurisdiction.']
  tax_residency_country varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of the beneficial owner\'s tax residency jurisdiction. Used for FATCA withholding determination, OECD CRS automatic exchange of information, and cross-border tax compliance.']
  verification_method varchar [note: 'Method used to verify the beneficial owner\'s identity during KYC onboarding. Includes document review (passport/ID scan), biometric verification, third-party database check (credit bureau, government registry), in-person verification, or electronic identity verification (eIDV).']

  Note: 'Tracks ultimate beneficial ownership (UBO) records for entities where legal ownership differs from beneficial ownership — required for FinCEN Corporate Transparency Act (CTA) compliance, AML/KYC regulations, and FATF standards. Captures beneficial owner identity, ownership threshold percentage (25%+ per CTA), control type (direct/indirect), verification status, regulatory disclosure flags, and filing reference numbers. Critical for institutional investors, trusts, shell companies, and multi-tier holding structures subject to mandatory UBO reporting.'
}

Business justification: AML/KYC compliance programs govern the kyc_profile lifecycle, review schedules, and risk rating methodology. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: individual|corporation|partnership|trust|reit|joint_venture|fund|government_entity — promote to reference product]']
  fatca_status varchar [note: 'FATCA compliance status for the owner or investor entity. Determines withholding obligations and IRS reporting requirements for foreign financial accounts and investments.']

  identity_verification_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the identity verification process for the owner or investor entity, reflecting whether government-issued ID, corporate registration, or trust documentation has been validated.']
  identity_verified_date date [note: 'Date on which identity verification was successfully completed for the owner or investor entity.']
  incorporation_country varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code of the jurisdiction where the entity was legally incorporated or registered. Applicable for corporate, partnership, trust, REIT, and joint venture entity types.']
  is_accredited_investor boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the owner or investor entity meets the SEC definition of an accredited investor under Regulation D, enabling participation in private placement real estate investment offerings.']
  is_pep boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the owner or investor entity (or its beneficial owners) has been identified as a Politically Exposed Person, requiring enhanced due diligence under FATF Recommendations.']
  kyc_approval_date date [note: 'Date on which the KYC profile was formally approved, enabling the owner or investor entity to proceed with property transactions, investment activities, or lease agreements.']
  kyc_expiry_date date [note: 'Date on which the current KYC approval expires. After this date, the entity must complete KYC renewal before engaging in new transactions.']
  kyc_reference_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known unique alphanumeric reference number assigned to this KYC profile, used in regulatory submissions, audit correspondence, and compliance tracking.']
  kyc_review_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the next periodic KYC review must be completed for the owner or investor entity. Frequency is determined by risk rating: high-risk entities require annual review, medium-risk biennial, low-risk triennial.']
  kyc_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the KYC profile. Drives onboarding workflow, investment eligibility, and regulatory reporting obligations.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date on which the most recent periodic KYC review was completed for the owner or investor entity.']
  last_review_outcome varchar [note: 'Outcome of the most recently completed periodic KYC review. Drives subsequent workflow actions such as enhanced due diligence, relationship termination, or regulatory reporting.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the KYC profile record was most recently modified. Supports change tracking and audit trail requirements.']
  onboarding_date date [note: 'Date on which the KYC onboarding process was initiated for the owner or investor entity.']
  pep_classification varchar [note: 'Specific classification of the PEP designation when is_pep is true. Determines the level of enhanced due diligence required. Null when is_pep is false.']
  risk_rating varchar [note: 'Overall AML/KYC risk classification assigned to the owner or investor entity based on due diligence findings, jurisdiction, entity type, and transaction patterns. Determines enhanced due diligence (EDD) requirements and review frequency.']
  sanctions_screened_date date [note: 'Most recent date on which sanctions screening was performed for the owner or investor entity.']
  sanctions_screening_status varchar [note: 'Current status of sanctions screening against OFAC SDN, EU Consolidated List, UN Sanctions List, and other applicable sanctions regimes for the owner or investor entity.']
  source_of_funds_verified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the source of funds used for real estate investment or acquisition has been verified and documented as part of AML due diligence.']
  source_of_wealth_verified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the overall source of wealth of the owner or investor entity has been verified, required for high-risk and PEP-designated entities under enhanced due diligence protocols.']
  tax_identification_number varchar [note: 'Federal tax identification number for the owner or investor entity. For individuals, this is the Social Security Number (SSN) or Individual Taxpayer Identification Number (ITIN). For entities, this is the Employer Identification Number (EIN). Required for FATCA, FIRPTA, and IRS reporting.']
  tax_residency_country varchar [note: 'ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 country code representing the primary tax residency jurisdiction of the owner or investor entity. Drives FATCA, CRS, and FIRPTA applicability determinations.']

  Note: 'Comprehensive Know Your Customer (KYC) onboarding, due diligence, and compliance lifecycle record for owner and investor entities. Stores identity verification status, AML screening results, PEP flags, sanctions screening status, risk rating, accredited investor certification, and last review date. Includes collected document inventory (passport, articles of incorporation, trust deed, tax certificates) with document type, issuing authority, issue/expiry dates, verification method, verification outcome, and storage references. Tracks compliance lifecycle events including KYC renewal due dates, beneficial ownership re-certification, FATCA/CRS reporting submissions, FIRPTA withholding events, AML re-screening triggers, event outcomes, and responsible parties. Supports regulatory compliance with BSA, FinCEN CTA, GDPR, and SEC requirements. Provides full audit trail for regulatory examinations.'
}

  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this owner agreement record was first created in the Silver Layer lakehouse. Supports data lineage, audit trail, and SOX compliance requirements.']
  dispute_resolution_mechanism varchar [note: 'Contractually specified mechanism for resolving disputes arising under the agreement. Informs legal risk management and compliance reporting.']
  docusign_envelope_code varchar [note: 'Unique envelope identifier from DocuSign CLM corresponding to the executed agreement. Enables direct retrieval of the signed document and audit trail from the contract lifecycle management system.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date on which the agreement becomes legally binding and operational obligations commence. Aligns with the commencement date field in Yardi Voyager contract records.']
  esg_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the agreement includes Environmental, Social, and Governance (ESG) compliance obligations, such as LEED certification maintenance, BREEAM targets, or ESG reporting requirements.']
  exclusivity_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the agreement grants the management or advisory firm exclusive rights to manage or transact on behalf of the owner for the covered properties or portfolio.']
  execution_date date [note: 'Date on which all parties formally signed and executed the agreement. May differ from effective_date for agreements with retroactive or future commencement. Sourced from DocuSign CLM completion timestamp.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date on which the agreement is scheduled to expire or terminate. Null for open-ended or evergreen agreements. Used for WALT/WALE calculations and renewal pipeline management.']
  fee_payment_frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency at which management and other recurring fees are invoiced and payable under the agreement. Drives Accounts Receivable (AR) billing cycles in Yardi Voyager.']
  governing_law_jurisdiction varchar [note: 'The legal jurisdiction whose laws govern interpretation and enforcement of this agreement (e.g., \'New York, USA\', \'England and Wales\'). Critical for dispute resolution and regulatory compliance reporting.']
  incentive_fee_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the agreement includes a performance-based incentive or promote fee structure in addition to the base management fee.']
  incentive_fee_hurdle_rate_pct decimal(8,4) [note: 'Minimum return threshold (hurdle rate) that must be achieved before the incentive or promote fee becomes payable to the asset manager. Expressed as an annual percentage (e.g., IRR or ROI threshold).']
  incentive_fee_pct decimal(8,4) [note: 'Percentage of outperformance above the hurdle rate payable as an incentive or promote fee to the asset manager. Null if incentive_fee_flag is false.']
  insurance_requirement_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the agreement specifies mandatory insurance coverage requirements (e.g., property insurance, liability, E&O) that the manager must maintain.']
  last_amendment_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent formal amendment or addendum executed against this agreement. Null if no amendments have been made.']
  management_fee_basis varchar [note: 'The income or revenue base upon which the management fee percentage is applied. EGI = Effective Gross Income; GRI = Gross Rental Income; NOI = Net Operating Income; NRI = Net Rental Income; GOI = Gross Operating Income; fixed = flat fee not tied to income.']
  management_fee_fixed_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Fixed periodic management fee amount in the agreement currency, applicable when management_fee_basis is \'fixed\'. Null when fee is percentage-based.']
  management_fee_pct decimal(8,4) [note: 'Base property or asset management fee expressed as a percentage of Effective Gross Income (EGI) or Gross Rental Income (GRI) as defined in the agreement. Core commercial term tracked in Yardi Voyager and MRI Software.']
  mri_agreement_ref varchar [note: 'Source system agreement or mandate reference number from MRI Software, used for investment management and property accounting reconciliation.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for capturing additional context, special conditions, or operational notes related to this agreement that are not captured in structured fields.']
  opex_approval_threshold decimal(18,2) [note: 'Maximum Operating Expenditure (OPEX) or single-transaction spend the property manager is authorized to approve without owner consent. Drives procurement controls in SAP S/4HANA and Yardi Voyager.']
  renewal_notice_days varchar [note: 'Number of calendar days prior to expiration by which notice of renewal or non-renewal must be provided. Drives automated alerts in Yardi Voyager and DocuSign CLM.']
  renewal_option_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the agreement contains a renewal or extension option clause that either party may exercise prior to expiration.']
  renewal_term_months varchar [note: 'Duration in months of each renewal period if the renewal option is exercised. Null if renewal_option_flag is false.']
  reporting_frequency varchar [note: 'Frequency at which the property or asset manager is contractually required to deliver financial and operational performance reports to the owner. Drives reporting obligations in Argus Enterprise and MRI Software.']
  scope_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the services, properties, or investment mandate covered by this agreement. Captures the business scope as defined in the agreement body.']
  termination_date date [note: 'Actual date on which the agreement was terminated early, if applicable. Null if the agreement expired naturally or is still active. Distinct from expiration_date which is the scheduled end.']
  termination_fee_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary penalty or break fee payable upon early termination of the agreement without cause, in the agreement currency. Null if no termination fee applies.']
  termination_for_cause_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the agreement contains a termination-for-cause clause allowing immediate termination upon material breach, insolvency, or other specified events.']
  termination_notice_days varchar [note: 'Number of calendar days of advance written notice required by either party to terminate the agreement without cause. Key contractual protection term.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when this owner agreement record was last modified in the Silver Layer lakehouse. Used for incremental data pipeline processing and audit trail.']
  yardi_contract_ref varchar [note: 'Source system contract or vendor agreement reference number from Yardi Voyager, used for cross-system reconciliation of fee billing, AP/AR entries, and General Ledger (GL) postings.']

  Note: 'Ownership and investor agreements governing the relationship between the owner entity and the property management/asset management firm — including property management agreements (PMAs), asset management mandates, JV operating agreements, co-ownership agreements, SNDA agreements, and subscription agreements. Captures agreement type, effective and expiration dates, governing law, fee structures (management fee %, incentive fee tiers), termination clauses, renewal terms, and DocuSign CLM execution reference.'
}

Table owner.owner_distribution {
  owner_distribution_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate identifier for each owner distribution record in the Silver layer lakehouse. Primary key for the owner_distribution data product.']
  approved_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Distribution approvals in real estate fund operations require an authorized employee (controller, CFO, fund accountant). Linking to workforce.employee enables SOX/audit trail compliance, approval work']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the property or asset from which the distribution originates. Supports property-level distribution reporting and NOI attribution.']
  commission_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to brokerage.commission. Business justification: Net proceeds distributions require deducting brokerage commissions from gross sale proceeds. Linking distribution to the commission record enables automated net proceeds calculation, investor waterfal']
  currency_code_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.currency_code. Business justification: Distribution currency drives FX conversion for multi-currency investor payments, withholding tax calculations, and K-1 reporting. Fund accountants require normalized currency reference for distributio']
  dev_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to development.dev_project. Business justification: Profit distributions from development projects (upon sale, stabilization, or promote crystallization) must be traceable to the specific project that generated proceeds. Development waterfall distribut']
  disbursement_bank_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.bank_account. Business justification: Distributions are disbursed from a specific operating or distribution bank account. Treasury reconciliation and bank statement matching require linking each distribution run to the source bank account']
  investment_distribution_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to investment.distribution. Business justification: Owner-level disbursements are sourced from fund-level distributions. This link enables reconciliation between fund waterfall distributions and actual owner disbursements — critical for K-1 preparation']
  legal_entity_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the legal investment entity (REIT, JV, partnership, fund) through which the distribution is made. Supports multi-entity ownership structures and investor reporting.']
  noi_statement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.noi_statement. Business justification: Owner distributions are calculated from distributable NOI per the NOI statement for the period. Linking distribution to the source NOI statement supports distribution waterfall auditing, investor repo']
  original_distribution_owner_distribution_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing identifier pointing to the original distribution record that this record corrects or reverses. Null for original distributions; populated for reversal or correction entries. Enables distribution lineage tracking.']
  owner_agreement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to owner.owner_agreement. Business justification: Distributions are governed by owner agreements that specify distribution frequency, payment method, and fee structures. Linking owner_distribution.owner_agreement_id -> owner_agreement.owner_agreement']
  owner_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the property owner or investor receiving this distribution. Links to the owner master record in the owner domain.']
  owner_ownership_interest_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to owner.ownership_interest. Business justification: Distributions to owners are calculated based on their ownership interest (equity stake and ownership percentage). owner_distribution has an inline ownership_percentage field which is an execution-time']
  ownership_structure_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to owner.ownership_structure. Business justification: Distributions are made from a specific ownership structure (the fund, JV, or entity that holds the property and generates income). Linking owner_distribution.ownership_structure_id -> ownership_struct']
  regulatory_obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_obligation. Business justification: Distributions to foreign owners trigger FATCA/FIRPTA withholding regulatory obligations. The owner_distribution has withholding_tax_rate and is_foreign_owner but no FK to the regulatory_obligation man']
  tax_treaty_country_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.country. Business justification: Tax treaty country determines reduced withholding tax rates applicable to foreign investor distributions. Tax compliance teams require normalized country reference to apply correct treaty rates and ge']
  valuation_nav_calculation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to valuation.nav_calculation. Business justification: Fund distributions are calculated based on NAV per unit. Linking each distribution record to the NAV calculation that drove it is a standard fund accounting requirement, enabling auditors and investor']
  waterfall_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to investment.waterfall. Business justification: Owner distributions are calculated per waterfall structure governing preferred return, carried interest, and LP/GP splits. Linking to the waterfall used is required for distribution audit trails, LP a']
  account_number_token varchar [note: 'Tokenized or masked representation of the owner\'s bank account number for disbursement. The actual account number is stored in a secure vault; this token is used for display, reconciliation, and audit trail only.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Authorization state of the distribution within the internal approval workflow. Pending = awaiting approver action; approved = authorized for disbursement; rejected = denied and requires revision. Supports dual-control SOX financial controls.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the distribution was formally approved by the authorized approver. Part of the SOX-compliant audit trail for financial disbursements.']
  bank_account_type varchar [note: 'Type of bank account designated for receiving distributions. Determines ACH transaction code and payment processing rules.']
  bank_account_verification_status varchar [note: 'Current verification state of the owner\'s bank account on file. Verified accounts are eligible for disbursement; unverified or failed accounts trigger a hold. Supports KYC/AML compliance and fraud prevention.']
  bank_account_verified_date date [note: 'Date on which the owner\'s bank account was last successfully verified through micro-deposit, Plaid, or manual confirmation. Used to determine if re-verification is required per policy.']
  bank_name varchar [note: 'Name of the financial institution holding the owner\'s disbursement account. Used for payment routing, AP reconciliation, and audit trail. Sourced from owner banking instructions on file.']
  calculation_period_end_date date [note: 'Last day of the operating period over which the distributable income was earned and calculated. Together with calculation_period_start_date defines the distribution window for income attribution.']
  calculation_period_start_date date [note: 'First day of the operating period over which the distributable income was earned and calculated (e.g., start of the quarter or month). Used for investor reporting, K-1 allocation, and WALE/WALT analytics.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this distribution record was first created in the system. Audit trail field supporting SOX financial controls and data lineage in the Silver layer lakehouse.']
  disbursement_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date and time when the funds were electronically transferred or check was issued to the owner. Distinct from distribution_date (scheduled); this is the actual execution timestamp. Null if not yet disbursed.']
  distributable_noi_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'The total property-level Net Operating Income (NOI) available for distribution during the calculation period, before applying the owner\'s ownership percentage. Supports NOI-based distribution calculations and investor reporting.']
  distribution_date date [note: 'The scheduled or actual date on which the distribution is to be paid to the owner. Used for cash flow forecasting, investor reporting, and AP scheduling. Corresponds to the Yardi distribution run date.']
  distribution_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known business identifier for this distribution event, used in investor statements, K-1 tax packages, and AP reconciliation. Format: DIST-YYYY-NNNNNN.']
  distribution_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the distribution record. Drives AP workflow, investor portal visibility, and reconciliation processes. Values: pending (calculated, awaiting approval), approved (authorized for payment), disbursed (funds transferred), on_hold (suspended pending review), cancelled (voided before payment), reversed (clawback or correction applied).']
  distribution_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the distribution by economic source. NOI = Net Operating Income distribution; FFO/AFFO = Funds From Operations per NAREIT definition; capital_gain = proceeds from asset disposition; return_of_capital = non-taxable return of invested principal; preferred_return = priority return to preferred equity holders; special = one-time or extraordinary distribution. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: noi|ffo|affo|capital_gain|return_of_capital|preferred_return|special — promote to reference product]']
  frequency varchar [note: 'The scheduled cadence at which distributions are made to this owner from this property or investment entity. Drives distribution calendar planning and investor expectation management.']
  gross_distribution_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Total pre-tax distribution amount calculated for the owner before any withholding tax, fees, or adjustments. Expressed in the distribution currency. Core monetary component of the MONETARY_TRIPLET.']
  iban varchar [note: 'International Bank Account Number (IBAN) for SEPA or cross-border distributions to international owners. Used in conjunction with SWIFT code for foreign disbursements. Null for domestic payments.']
  is_foreign_owner boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the owner is a foreign person or entity subject to FIRPTA withholding and IRS Form 1042-S reporting requirements. True = foreign owner; False = domestic US owner. Drives withholding tax logic and international payment routing.']
  k1_tax_year varchar [note: 'The IRS tax year (YYYY) to which this distribution is attributed for Schedule K-1 reporting purposes. Partnerships and REITs must issue K-1s to partners/investors annually. Used for tax package preparation and investor tax reporting.']
  net_disbursement_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Actual amount transferred to the owner after deducting withholding tax and any other adjustments from the gross distribution amount. This is the cash received by the owner. Core net total of the MONETARY_TRIPLET.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional context, special instructions, or investor communication notes related to this distribution. Used by asset managers and AP staff for exception handling and investor inquiries.']
  ownership_percentage decimal(8,6) [note: 'The owner\'s fractional equity stake in the property or investment entity at the time of this distribution, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.250000 = 25%). Used to calculate the owner\'s pro-rata share of distributable income. Sourced from the ownership agreement.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'The disbursement method used to transfer funds to the owner. ACH = Automated Clearing House domestic transfer; wire = domestic wire transfer; check = physical check; swift = international SWIFT wire; iban_transfer = SEPA or IBAN-based international transfer.']
  preferred_disbursement_method varchar [note: 'The owner\'s standing preferred method for receiving distributions, as recorded in their disbursement instructions. May differ from the actual payment_method used for a specific distribution if the preferred method was unavailable.']
  reversal_reason varchar [note: 'Free-text explanation for why a distribution was reversed or cancelled. Required when distribution_status is \'reversed\' or \'cancelled\'. Supports audit trail and investor communication.']
  routing_number_token varchar [note: 'Tokenized or masked representation of the ABA routing number for the owner\'s disbursement bank account. The actual routing number is stored in a secure vault; this token is used for display and audit purposes only. Required for ACH and domestic wire processing.']
  swift_code varchar [note: 'SWIFT Business Identifier Code (BIC) for international wire transfers to foreign owners. Required for SWIFT-based disbursements. Null for domestic ACH/wire payments.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when this distribution record was last modified. Tracks changes to distribution amounts, status, banking instructions, or approval state. Supports audit trail and change data capture in the lakehouse.']
  withholding_tax_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Amount of income tax withheld from the gross distribution at source, including federal, state, or foreign withholding as applicable. Deducted from gross to arrive at net disbursement. Required for K-1 and 1042-S tax reporting.']
  withholding_tax_rate decimal(8,6) [note: 'The applicable withholding tax rate applied to the gross distribution, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.300000 = 30%). Determined by owner tax residency, treaty status, and distribution type. Used for K-1 and 1042-S preparation.']
  yardi_distribution_run_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the Yardi Voyager distribution batch run that generated this distribution record. Used for batch-level reconciliation, reprocessing, and audit trail back to the source system.']
  yardi_gl_reference varchar [note: 'Cross-reference identifier linking this distribution record to the corresponding General Ledger (GL) journal entry in Yardi Voyager. Enables AP reconciliation between the owner distribution record and the accounting entry. Supports SOX financial controls.']

  Note: 'SSOT for income and capital distributions made to owners from property operations, including disbursement banking instructions. This is the owner-perspective distribution record, distinct from finance domain GL entries which record the accounting impact. Captures distribution type (NOI, FFO/AFFO, capital gain, return of capital, preferred return), calculation period, gross amount, withholding tax, net disbursement amount, distribution date, payment method, and Yardi GL cross-reference. Also stores owner bank account and disbursement details: bank name, account type, routing number (masked/tokenized), SWIFT/IBAN for international owners, preferred disbursement method, and account verification status. Supports investor reporting, tax K-1 preparation, and AP reconciliation.'
}

Table owner.capital_contribution {
  capital_contribution_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for each capital contribution record. Primary key for the capital_contribution data product in the owner domain.']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific property asset receiving the capital contribution, if the contribution is property-level rather than fund-level. Nullable for fund-level contributions.']
  brokerage_deal_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to brokerage.deal. Business justification: Capital contributions fund property acquisitions originated through brokerage deals. Linking enables capital call reconciliation against deal close dates, acquisition cost basis tracking, and investor']
  capex_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to maintenance.capex_project. Business justification: Capital call management: owner capital contributions are frequently tied to specific capex projects (renovations, TI buildouts). This link supports investor reporting, K-1 cost basis allocation, and c']
  capital_call_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to investment.capital_call. Business justification: Capital contributions are triggered by capital call notices. Linking contribution to the originating capital_call is required for cash management, default tracking, funded/shortfall reconciliation, an']
  capital_commitment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to investment.commitment. Business justification: Each capital contribution reduces the uncalled commitment balance. This link is required for unfunded commitment tracking, LP capital account statements, and commitment compliance reporting — standard']
  currency_code_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.currency_code. Business justification: Capital contribution currency drives FX conversion to USD for capital account tracking, unfunded commitment calculations, and investor reporting. Fund accountants require normalized currency reference']
  dev_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to development.dev_project. Business justification: Capital calls in development are tied to project milestones (construction phases, draw schedules). Tracking capital_contribution at the dev_project level enables capital call management, unfunded comm']
  draw_request_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to development.draw_request. Business justification: Equity capital contributions are directly triggered by construction draw requests. Lenders and equity investors fund draws in tandem; linking capital_contribution to draw_request enables reconciliatio']
  investment_vehicle_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the investment vehicle, joint-venture entity, REIT, or fund structure into which the capital is being contributed.']
  owner_agreement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to owner.owner_agreement. Business justification: capital_contribution has an agreement_ref (STRING) field that stores a text reference to the governing agreement. Normalizing this to owner_agreement_id -> owner_agreement.owner_agreement_id replaces ']
  owner_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the owner or investor entity making the capital contribution, as recorded in the owner master data product.']
  owner_ownership_interest_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the ownership interest record that this capital contribution is associated with, enabling pro-rata equity tracking and waterfall calculations.']
  receiving_bank_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.bank_account. Business justification: Capital contributions (equity calls) are received into a designated capital call or operating bank account. Treasury and capital account reconciliation require linking each contribution to the receivi']
  accounting_period varchar [note: 'The fiscal accounting period (YYYY-MM format) in which this capital contribution is recognized for financial reporting purposes. May differ from contribution_date if the contribution is received near a period boundary.']
  called_amount decimal(20,4) [note: 'The amount of capital formally called or requested from the investor via a capital call notice. May differ from contribution_amount if the investor funded partially or over-funded. Used to track unfunded commitment drawdown progress.']
  capex_category varchar [note: 'The CAPEX category that this capital contribution is intended to fund. Acquisition covers property purchase equity; development covers ground-up construction; renovation covers value-add improvements; tenant_improvement covers TI allowances; infrastructure covers building systems and utilities.']
  capital_account_balance_after decimal(20,4) [note: 'The investor\'s capital account balance immediately after this contribution event is applied. Used for equity waterfall inputs, NAV calculations, and investor reporting.']
  capital_account_balance_before decimal(20,4) [note: 'The investor\'s capital account balance immediately prior to this contribution event. Provides a point-in-time snapshot for audit trail, reconciliation, and equity waterfall analysis.']
  capital_call_due_date date [note: 'The date by which the investor was required to fund the capital call per the capital call notice. Used to identify late contributions, calculate default interest, and monitor investor compliance with funding obligations.']
  capital_call_notice_ref varchar [note: 'Reference number or identifier of the formal capital call notice issued to the investor that triggered this contribution. Links the funding event back to the capital call document for audit and compliance purposes.']
  contribution_amount decimal(20,4) [note: 'Gross amount of capital contributed by the owner or investor in the transaction currency. This is the base monetary amount before any adjustments, fees, or withholdings. Core component of the MONETARY_TRIPLET for this transaction.']
  contribution_amount_usd decimal(20,4) [note: 'Contribution amount converted to USD at the applicable exchange rate on the contribution date. Used for consolidated portfolio reporting, NAV calculations, and AUM tracking across multi-currency investment vehicles.']
  contribution_date date [note: 'The actual business date on which the capital contribution was received and recorded, i.e., the value date of the equity funding event. Used for equity waterfall calculations and capital account balance updates.']
  contribution_reference varchar [note: 'Externally-known business reference number or code assigned to this capital contribution event, used for cross-referencing with investor notices, capital call letters, and wire instructions. Sourced from Yardi Voyager or MRI Software capital account module.']
  contribution_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the capital contribution record. Pending indicates a capital call has been issued but funds not yet received; funded indicates wire confirmed; partially_funded indicates only a portion of the called amount was received; returned indicates capital was returned to investor; cancelled indicates the contribution was voided.']
  contribution_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the nature of the capital contribution. Initial equity is the founding equity injection; capital_call is a drawdown against an unfunded commitment; preferred_equity is a senior equity tranche injection; co_invest is a co-investment alongside a primary fund; return_of_capital is a distribution classified as capital return; additional_equity is a supplemental equity injection post-initial close. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: initial_equity|capital_call|preferred_equity|co_invest|return_of_capital|additional_equity — promote to reference product]']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this capital contribution record was first created in the data platform. Represents the RECORD_AUDIT_CREATED category for audit trail and data lineage compliance.']
  default_interest_amount decimal(20,4) [note: 'The default interest or penalty amount charged to the investor for late funding of a capital call, as specified in the partnership or JV agreement. Applicable only when is_late_funding is True.']
  equity_tier varchar [note: 'The equity tranche or tier classification of this capital contribution within the investment vehicle\'s capital stack. Determines priority in the equity waterfall distribution model (e.g., preferred equity receives distributions before common equity).']
  funding_source_type varchar [note: 'The mechanism or instrument used to fund the capital contribution. Wire transfer and ACH are cash funding methods; in_kind indicates a non-cash asset contribution; debt_conversion indicates conversion of a loan to equity; reinvestment indicates distribution proceeds reinvested as new capital.']
  fx_rate decimal(18,8) [note: 'Exchange rate applied to convert the contribution amount from the transaction currency to USD on the contribution date. Sourced from the reference data FX rate table. A value of 1.0 indicates the contribution is already in USD.']
  gl_account_code varchar [note: 'The GL account code in the chart of accounts to which this capital contribution is posted in the accounting system (Yardi Voyager or SAP S/4HANA). Enables reconciliation between the owner domain capital account and the finance domain GL entries.']
  investor_entity_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the investor or owner entity type making the contribution. Determines applicable regulatory reporting requirements, tax treatment, and KYC/AML obligations. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: individual|institutional|reit|jv_entity|partnership|fund|family_office|sovereign_wealth — promote to reference product]']
  is_late_funding boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the capital contribution was received after the capital call due date. True if contribution_date is after capital_call_due_date. Used to trigger default interest calculations and investor compliance monitoring.']
  kyc_verified boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the contributing investor has completed KYC verification as required by AML regulations prior to this contribution being accepted. True indicates KYC is current and verified; False indicates KYC is pending or expired.']
  net_contribution_amount decimal(20,4) [note: 'The net amount of capital credited to the investor\'s capital account after deducting tax withholdings, default interest charges, or other adjustments from the gross contribution_amount. Represents the net total in the MONETARY_TRIPLET.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text notes or comments recorded by the asset manager or fund administrator regarding this capital contribution event. May include special conditions, investor instructions, or reconciliation remarks.']
  ownership_pct_after decimal(8,6) [note: 'The investor\'s pro-rata ownership percentage in the investment vehicle or property immediately after this capital contribution is applied. Reflects any dilution or accretion resulting from the contribution event.']
  ownership_pct_before decimal(8,6) [note: 'The investor\'s pro-rata ownership percentage in the investment vehicle or property immediately before this capital contribution. Expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.25 = 25%). Used to track dilution or accretion events.']
  preferred_return_accrual_method varchar [note: 'The method by which the preferred return accrues on this capital contribution. Simple interest accrues on the original contribution only; compound accrues on the outstanding balance including accrued return; cumulative_non_compounding tracks unpaid preferred return without compounding.']
  preferred_return_rate decimal(8,6) [note: 'The annual preferred return rate (hurdle rate) applicable to this capital contribution, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 0.08 = 8%). Determines the minimum return threshold before promote/carried interest is earned in the equity waterfall.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'The operational system of record from which this capital contribution record was originated or ingested. Used for data lineage tracking and reconciliation in the Databricks Silver Layer.']
  source_system_ref varchar [note: 'The native record identifier from the originating source system (e.g., Yardi Voyager transaction ID, MRI Software capital account entry ID). Enables traceability and reconciliation back to the system of record.']
  tax_withholding_amount decimal(20,4) [note: 'The amount withheld from the capital contribution for tax purposes, applicable to foreign investors subject to FIRPTA withholding or other tax withholding obligations. Part of the MONETARY_TRIPLET adjustment component.']
  unfunded_commitment_after decimal(20,4) [note: 'The investor\'s remaining unfunded commitment balance immediately after this capital contribution event is applied. Calculated as unfunded_commitment_before minus contribution_amount. Stored for audit trail and point-in-time reporting.']
  unfunded_commitment_before decimal(20,4) [note: 'The investor\'s remaining unfunded commitment balance immediately prior to this capital contribution event. Used to validate that the called amount does not exceed the outstanding commitment and to track drawdown progress.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this capital contribution record was last modified in the data platform. Represents the RECORD_AUDIT_UPDATED category for audit trail and change tracking compliance.']
  use_of_proceeds varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the intended use of the contributed capital, as specified in the capital call notice or investment agreement. Examples include property acquisition down payment, construction draw funding, debt paydown, or working capital reserve.']
  wire_confirmation_ref varchar [note: 'The bank wire confirmation number, ACH trace number, or payment reference provided by the investor\'s financial institution upon funding. Used for reconciliation against bank statements and to confirm receipt of funds.']

  Note: 'SSOT for equity capital contributions made by owners and investors into properties, JV structures, or investment vehicles — recorded from the owner/investor perspective. Distinct from finance domain GL entries which record the accounting debit/credit impact. Captures contribution date, amount, currency, contribution type (initial equity, capital call response, preferred equity injection, co-invest), ownership percentage impact, funding source, wire confirmation reference, and capital account balance impact. Tracks CAPEX funding events, equity waterfall inputs, and unfunded commitment drawdowns. Linked to ownership_interest for pro-rata tracking.'
}

Table owner.ownership_transfer {
  ownership_transfer_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for each ownership interest transfer record. Primary key for the ownership_transfer data product.']
  appraisal_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to valuation.appraisal. Business justification: Ownership transfers require a formal appraisal to establish fair market value for transfer consideration, tax basis determination, FIRPTA compliance, and 1031 exchange qualification. Real estate attor']
  approving_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Real estate ownership transfers require internal employee approval (asset manager, legal counsel, or CFO) per investment policy. Linking to workforce.employee enables approval audit trails, delegation']
  asset_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the property asset whose ownership interest is being transferred. Links the transfer record to the specific real estate asset in the property domain.']
  assumed_debt_instrument_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.debt_instrument. Business justification: Property ownership transfers frequently involve loan assumptions or defeasance of existing debt. Linking the transfer to the specific debt instrument is required for lender consent tracking, ALTA clos']
  brokerage_broker_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the licensed real estate broker or brokerage firm that facilitated this ownership transfer. Tracks brokerage activity for commission calculations and NAR compliance. Null for direct transfers without broker involvement.']
  brokerage_deal_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to brokerage.deal. Business justification: The brokerage deal triggers commission payment and closing milestones; the ownership transfer is the legal execution event. Linking them enables post-close commission disbursement triggering, 1031 exc']

Business justification: Transfer consideration currency drives FX conversion for cross-border ownership transfers, transfer tax calculations, and capital gains reporting. Finance and tax teams require normalized currency ref']
  fund_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to investment.fund. Business justification: LP interest transfers occur within a specific fund. Fund administrators require this link for cap table maintenance, ROFR enforcement, transfer approval workflows, and secondary market transfer report']
  jurisdiction_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.jurisdiction. Business justification: Transfer recording jurisdiction determines applicable transfer taxes, deed recording requirements, and regulatory filings. The recording_jurisdiction plain-text column is a denormalized representation']
  lender_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the financing institution providing acquisition financing for the transferee in connection with this transfer. Relevant for Loan-to-Value (LTV) ratio tracking and Debt Service Coverage Ratio (DSCR) analysis. Null for all-cash transfers.']
  listing_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to brokerage.listing. Business justification: Ownership transfers (title recording, deed execution) must reference the originating listing for ALTA settlement statement reconciliation, commission settlement, and MLS close reporting — standard pos']
  owner_agreement_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to owner.owner_agreement. Business justification: Ownership transfers are governed by agreements (purchase and sale agreements, JV buyout agreements, equity transfer agreements). Linking ownership_transfer.owner_agreement_id -> owner_agreement.owner_']
  owner_ownership_interest_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to owner.ownership_interest. Business justification: An ownership transfer is fundamentally the transfer of a specific ownership interest between parties. ownership_transfer already has transferor_owner_id and transferee_owner_id but critically lacks a ']
  policy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to insurance.policy. Business justification: Real estate closings require the insurance policy to be assigned, endorsed, or replaced at ownership transfer. Linking ownership_transfer to the affected policy enables closing coordinators to track i']
  primary_ownership_transferor_owner_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the owner or investor entity relinquishing the ownership interest. Represents the selling or transferring party in the transaction.']
  property_sale_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to transaction.property_sale. Business justification: When a property sale closes, an ownership transfer record is created to reflect the change in ownership interest. Linking ownership_transfer to the triggering property_sale enables reconciliation of o']
  recording_geographic_hierarchy_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.geographic_hierarchy. Title officers and closing attorneys require normalized geographic hierarchy to a']
  regulatory_obligation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to compliance.regulatory_obligation. Business justification: Ownership transfers trigger specific regulatory obligations (FIRPTA withholding, transfer tax filings, 1031 exchange IRS rules, beneficial ownership disclosure). Compliance teams track which regulator']
  title_record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to property.title_record. Business justification: Every ownership transfer produces a recorded deed captured in title_record. Linking ownership_transfer to title_record is essential for chain-of-title tracking, closing reconciliation, and title insur']
  transaction_type_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to reference.transaction_type. Business justification: Ownership transfer transaction type (arm\'s length sale, 1031 exchange, gift, foreclosure, contribution) determines tax basis treatment, transfer tax applicability, SEC reportability, and title insuran']
  agreement_execution_date date [note: 'The date on which the purchase and sale agreement, assignment agreement, or other binding transfer instrument was signed by all parties. May precede the transfer_date (closing date) by days or weeks during the due diligence period.']
  allocated_property_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'The total assessed or agreed fair market value of the underlying property at the time of transfer, used to compute the proportional value of the interest being transferred. Sourced from Argus Enterprise valuation models or appraisal reports.']
  alta_settlement_statement_ref varchar [note: 'Reference identifier for the ALTA Uniform Settlement Statement (HUD-1 or ALTA Settlement Statement) associated with this transfer. Documents all financial terms, prorations, and closing costs. Used for audit and tax basis calculations.']
  approval_date date [note: 'The date on which the ownership transfer was formally approved by the designated approval authority. Distinct from the agreement execution date and transfer date. Required for SOX controls and investment committee governance documentation.']
  beneficial_owner_disclosed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the ultimate beneficial owner(s) of the transferee entity have been disclosed and verified as part of the KYC/AML onboarding process. True when beneficial ownership disclosure is complete and on file. Required for FinCEN Geographic Targeting Orders and AML compliance.']
  capital_gains_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the transfer is expected to generate a taxable capital gain or loss for the transferor. True when the consideration amount exceeds the transferor\'s adjusted tax basis in the interest. Drives tax provision calculations and investor reporting.']
  consideration_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The gross monetary consideration paid by the transferee to the transferor for the ownership interest. Represents the agreed purchase price or fair market value of the interest transferred. Used for stamp duty, transfer tax, and capital gains calculations. Null for gift or inheritance transfers.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this ownership transfer record was first created in the data platform. Audit trail field for data governance and lineage tracking. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  due_diligence_end_date date [note: 'The contractual deadline by which the transferee must complete all due diligence activities (title search, environmental review, financial audit) and either proceed with or cancel the transfer. Tracks deal timeline milestones.']
  exchange_1031_case_number varchar [note: 'The qualified intermediary case or exchange reference number assigned when this transfer is part of a Section 1031 like-kind exchange. Null for non-exchange transfers. Required for IRS compliance documentation and deferred gain tracking.']
  kyc_verification_status varchar [note: 'The current status of the Know Your Customer (KYC) and Anti-Money Laundering (AML) identity verification process for the transferee party. Required for regulatory compliance on all ownership transfers above reporting thresholds.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The timestamp when this ownership transfer record was most recently modified in the data platform. Used for incremental data processing, change detection, and audit trail maintenance. Format: yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSSXXX.']
  loan_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The principal amount of the mortgage or acquisition loan obtained by the transferee to finance this ownership interest transfer. Used for Loan-to-Value (LTV) ratio computation and debt covenant monitoring.']
  ltv_ratio decimal(7,4) [note: 'The ratio of the acquisition loan amount to the allocated property value at the time of transfer, expressed as a percentage (e.g., 65.0000 = 65% LTV). Key underwriting metric for lenders and portfolio risk management.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional context, special conditions, or qualifications related to the ownership transfer that are not captured in structured fields. Examples include right-of-first-refusal waivers, co-owner consent notes, or regulatory condition summaries.']
  ownership_structure_type varchar [note: 'The legal ownership structure of the interest being transferred. Determines applicable regulations, tax treatment, and reporting requirements. Values: individual (natural person), partnership (general or limited partnership), jv (joint venture entity), reit (Real Estate Investment Trust), trust (land trust, revocable/irrevocable trust), corporate (corporation or LLC). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: individual|partnership|jv|reit|trust|corporate|tenancy_in_common|tenancy_by_entirety — promote to reference product]']
  post_transfer_ownership_pct decimal(7,4) [note: 'The transferor\'s remaining ownership percentage in the property immediately after this transfer event. Computed as pre_transfer_ownership_pct minus transfer_percentage. Stored for audit trail and consolidation analysis.']
  pre_transfer_ownership_pct decimal(7,4) [note: 'The transferor\'s ownership percentage in the property immediately before this transfer event. Provides the baseline for computing post-transfer ownership stakes and validating that transfer_percentage does not exceed the transferor\'s held interest.']
  recording_book_page varchar [note: 'The official book and page number (or document number in electronic recording systems) assigned by the recording jurisdiction upon filing of the title instrument. Used for public records retrieval and chain-of-title verification.']
  recording_date date [note: 'The date on which the title instrument was officially recorded with the relevant governmental authority (county recorder, land registry). May differ from the transfer_date; recording establishes constructive notice to third parties.']
  snda_agreement_ref varchar [note: 'Reference identifier for the Subordination, Non-Disturbance and Attornment (SNDA) agreement executed in connection with this transfer, protecting existing tenant leases from disruption due to the ownership change. Sourced from DocuSign CLM.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'The operational system of record from which this ownership transfer record originated. Enables data lineage tracking and reconciliation across Yardi Voyager, MRI Software, Argus Enterprise, and other integrated platforms.']
  source_system_record_code varchar [note: 'The native record identifier from the originating operational system (e.g., Yardi Voyager ownership transfer ID, MRI Software transaction key). Enables bidirectional traceability between the lakehouse Silver layer and the system of record.']
  tax_basis_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The transferor\'s adjusted tax basis in the ownership interest at the time of transfer. Used to compute realized gain or loss for income tax purposes. For 1031 exchanges, the carryover basis is tracked here.']
  title_insurance_policy_number varchar [note: 'The policy number of the title insurance policy issued to the transferee (owner\'s policy) or lender (lender\'s policy) in connection with this transfer. Provides protection against title defects and encumbrances not discovered during due diligence.']
  transfer_costs_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total transaction costs incurred in executing the ownership transfer, including legal fees, title search fees, recording fees, broker commissions, and due diligence costs. Capitalized as part of the cost basis per FASB ASC 805.']
  transfer_date date [note: 'The principal real-world effective date on which the ownership interest legally transferred from transferor to transferee. This is the date of record for title and tax purposes, distinct from the agreement execution date.']
  transfer_percentage decimal(7,4) [note: 'The percentage of the total ownership interest being transferred, expressed as a decimal (e.g., 25.0000 = 25%). Enables partial interest transfers within joint-venture and partnership structures. Must be between 0.0001 and 100.0000.']
  transfer_reference_number varchar [note: 'Externally-known business identifier for the ownership transfer event, used in correspondence, legal documents, and system cross-references. Sourced from Yardi Voyager or MRI Software ownership module.']
  transfer_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the ownership transfer workflow. Tracks progression from initiation through legal completion. Values: pending (initiated, awaiting documentation), in_review (under legal/compliance review), approved (authorized for execution), completed (title recorded and transfer finalized), cancelled (transfer voided before completion), reversed (completed transfer subsequently unwound).']
  transfer_tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'The total real estate transfer tax, documentary stamp tax, or conveyance tax assessed on the ownership transfer by the applicable jurisdiction. Computed based on consideration amount and local tax rates. Required for tax compliance reporting.']

  Note: 'Records the transfer of ownership interests between parties — including equity stake transfers, JV buyouts, inheritance transfers, 1031 exchanges, and foreclosure/REO transfers. Captures transfer type, transferor (owner FK), transferee (owner FK), transfer date, consideration amount, transfer percentage, title instrument reference, ALTA settlement statement reference, recording jurisdiction, and tax implications. Distinct from the transaction domain which records full property acquisition/disposition events; this product tracks interest-level transfers within existing ownership structures.'
}

Direct FK enables tax reporting by entity without multi-hop joins, supporting regulatory filings (IRS Schedule K-1']
  owner_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the property owner or investor entity in the owner master product. Links the tax record to the owning party (individual, institutional investor, REIT, JV entity, or partnership).']

  appeal_status varchar [note: 'Current status of any formal appeal or contest filed against the taxing authority\'s assessed value or tax bill. Tracks the appeal lifecycle from filing through resolution. A successful appeal may result in a tax abatement.']
  assessed_tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Gross tax amount assessed or levied by the taxing authority for this tax year and jurisdiction, expressed in the record currency. For property tax, this is the annual tax bill amount. For withholding tax, this is the amount withheld. For K-1 allocations, this is the allocated taxable income amount.']
